programme.desc: Scientist Stephen Hawking challenges three ordinary people to work out why they exist at all. Hawking takes them down a rabbit hole of profound realizations, helping them think like philosophers as much as scientists.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Who Am I?
programme.desc: Explore some of America’s best-loved novels that explore the age-old question, 'Who Am I?' Featured books include J.D. Salinger’s 'The Catcher in the Rye', S.E. Hinton’s 'The Outsiders' and Harper Lee’s 'To Kill a Mockingbird.'

programme.title: American Masters: Lorraine Hansberry: Sighted Eyes/ Feeling Heart
programme.desc: Tracy Heather Strain examines Lorraine Hansberry’s life and work using a remarkable collection of archival footage, home movies, rare photos and unpublished documents.

programme.title: NCIS: Charade
programme.desc: After Tony's identity is stolen by multiple perpetrators, the fake Special Agent DiNozzos begin blackmailing Senators.

programme.title: NCIS: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Gibbs and Senior FBI Agent T.C. Fornell unite after two British prisoners, including a former spy, escape and arrive stateside via a shipping container. Also, McGee is busy apartment hunting and determined to find out how DiNozzo bought his lavish place.

programme.title: NCIS: Homefront
programme.desc: When a 14-year-old foils a home invasion, Gibbs suspects the teenager is withholding pertinent details. Also, Director Vance and Senior FBI Agent Fornell travel to London as part of the ongoing escaped British spy case.

programme.title: WWE NXT
programme.desc: A unique acrobatic and theatrically aggressive presentation of wrestling.

programme.title: Movie: Speed
programme.desc: A mad bomber rigs an L.A. bus to blow if it drops below 50 m.p.h. and a police officer must rescue the commuters trapped inside.

programme.title: Modern Family: Schooled
programme.desc: The day has arrived for Phil and Claire to drop Haley off at college, which is a difficult moment for any parent. It's made worse when they manage to really embarrass Haley. Manny forces Jay and Gloria to take a baby class.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snip
programme.desc: Phil and Claire plan to vacation and enjoy life once Luke leaves for college, so Phil goes in for a vasectomy. Meanwhile, Jay and Gloria disagree about whether or not to find out the sex of the baby. Mitch tries to steer Cam towards getting a job.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Wow Factor

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fight

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Signature

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets in the Mist

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Grissom's Divine Comedy

programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Pee
programme.desc: The boys' fun-filled day at the water park turn deadly when the pool's pee vs. water ratio reaches catastrophic levels.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: Crank Yankers: Nikki Glaser, Jimmy Kimmel and Tracy Morgan
programme.desc: Landalious pitches his own wine brand, Elmer tries to find his missing gym clothes, and Bobby tries to leverage his Yelp notoriety to get special treatment at a restaurant.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 18, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard
programme.desc: When the other boys kick Cartman out of their band, he pulls his own group together to make music for Jesus.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society
programme.desc: Bebe is the first girl in the fourth grade to 'develop.' Her new little breasts inspire a primate-like reaction from all the boys in class that threatens their friendship and society in general.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 18, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: Conjoined Fetus Lady
programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: The boys discover a prehistoric creature called a Jackovasaur while camping at Stark's Pond.

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'

programme.title: South Park: Jared Has Aides
programme.desc: As the country becomes obsessed with a popular program for losing weight, the boys see an opportunity to become sponsored by a local restaurant.

programme.title: South Park: Two Guys Naked in a Hot Tub
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with a 'bunch of Melvins.' The ATF believes everyone in the house to be part of a cult, and Stan and the 'Angels' must save the day.

programme.desc: Doug and the guys take a trip to try and stop Spence's ex-girlfriend from getting married.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Icky Shuffle

programme.title: The King of Queens: Awful Bigamy
programme.desc: Doug is reluctant to let Holly move in with them after she gets kicked out of her place.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Lost Vegas

programme.desc: When Carrie insists that Doug join an overeaters support group, he secretly opts out.

programme.desc: Doug is forced to work on his impersonation skills when he loses his lunchtime audience.

programme.desc: Doug is forced to track down his father at a convention to discuss his parents' marriage.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Silent Mite
programme.desc: Doug is convinced that a 'little person' stole his wallet while he was out shopping.

programme.desc: When Deacon and Kelly find new friends, Doug and Carrie must turn to their old friends.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cologne Ranger
programme.desc: Doug senses his manhood slipping away when Carrie forbids him to wear his new cologne.

programme.desc: Doug is unhappy with Carrie's choice for a housekeeper so he hires Spence's mom, Veronica.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pour Judgment

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gym Neighbors
programme.desc: When Carrie puts on a couple of pounds, Doug persuades her to start weight training.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gorilla Warfare
programme.desc: Doug is forced to come up with an original romantic phrase to use on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi, School
programme.desc: Doug can't get enough of reliving his glory days when he runs into his ex-football coach.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deconstructing Carrie
programme.desc: As Carrie approaches her 35th birthday, Doug bribes construction workers to hoot at her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: The Kitchen Window
programme.desc: A small beach-town community is frightened when a young waitress is found stabbed more than 100 times in her apartment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: DNA Dragnet
programme.desc: Security camera video shows that what appears to be a casual encounter is actually a forced abduction, leading to murder. The perpetrator’s MO is remarkably similar to another murder which occurred five months earlier only 15 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Drowning Sorrows
programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Once Bitten, Twice Tried
programme.desc: Bite marks on a murder victims’ body twice lead to Ray Krone's conviction, but the DNA evidence tells another story.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Murder in the Church
programme.desc: Missy Bevers was a mom and a fitness instructor in her community. As she’s setting up for an early-morning workout class at the local church, surveillance cameras capture a disturbing series of images; her killer, lurking the halls.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazi Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Josh heads to Europe to expose the last secrets of the Third Reich. The lost fortune of a Nazi war criminal draws Josh to Austria, where he may need to dive deep to find treasure. He also meets a researcher who may have made a historic find.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of Shangri-La
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks high into the Sky Caves of Nepal in search of the origins of the Shangri-La myth.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Digging Into D-Day Part 1
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Digging Into D-Day Part 2
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: GI Josh
programme.desc: In honor of D-Day, Josh interviews actor Dennis Quaid and Seal Team 6's Will Chesney who was part of the raid that took out Osama Bin Laden. Josh also learns the hard way that our military's canine unit is more effective than ever.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Gold Hoard
programme.desc: Josh searches for the Kruger Millions in the harsh wild of South Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Digging Into D-Day Part 2
programme.desc: Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.desc: In honor of D-Day, Josh interviews actor Dennis Quaid and Seal Team 6's Will Chesney who was part of the raid that took out Osama Bin Laden. Josh also learns the hard way that our military's canine unit is more effective than ever.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Italy's Barbarian Booty
programme.desc: To find the plundered riches of the Roman Empire, Josh Gates must locate the tomb of the Visigoth king Alaric in Italy. The hunt extends from the capital of Rome to the southern city of Cosenza, where the mayor is spearheading an effort to find the tomb.

programme.title: Inside the FBI
programme.desc: Agents from the San Diego FBI office share details of ongoing cases including a Mexican Mafia takedown and a drug cartel mass murder.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America, but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Secret America
programme.desc: They are the most iconic symbols of America: but lurking behind each one are conspiracy theories, myths, and lies.

programme.title: Smalltown Throwdown: The Most Boring and The Drunkest
programme.desc: In a quest to redeem towns with notorious reputations, comedian host Mo Mandel travels to the 'Most Boring town' and 'Drunkest town' in America to see if they actually deserve their infamous monikers.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Toilet Crusher
programme.desc: Mike heads to Arkansas to perform tests on Alligator Snapping Turtles, the he heads to San Francisco where he removes and recycles toilets.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Penguin Keeper
programme.desc: Mike Rowe joins a rowdy construction crew in California and learns the art of concrete stamping. Mike later takes care of some penguins and digs for bloodworms.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wine Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the Napa Valley and gets extremely dirty as he takes on the unappealing job of making wine. Mike then rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty at a Kansas Cattle Ranch where he gets a lesson on how dirty the cattle business can be.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mannequin Factory
programme.desc: Mike finds himself at the Windsorland Mobile Home Park where homes are being broken down to make room for a new shopping center, and then he heads off to Patina-V where he learns that making mannequins is not only a dirty job, but a form of art as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mud Mineral Excavator
programme.desc: Mike Rowe gets dirty at a California mineral mine where everything seems to go wrong. Then he heads to a South Carolina rice plantation where he masters the art of milling rice.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bell Maker
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty when he rolls up his sleeves and makes giant bells at the McShane Bell Foundry. Mike also gets down and dirty with the United States Army Corps of Engineers as they conduct yearly maintenance on a hurricane barrier raised from the ocean.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Rena and Lee's Story
programme.desc: Lee and Rena are battling health and anger issues while taking a desperate, second attempt to save their relationship and their lives.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: The Assanti Brothers
programme.desc: Steven heals from his weight loss surgery. His brother, Justin, finally decides to come to Texas to have the same procedure done. His feelings towards his brother, however, may sabotage his hopes of surgery.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Joyce's Story
programme.desc: Joyce needs home health care 24/7 and hasn't left the house in 3 years. But getting to Dr. Now in Houston is just the first step, and when he prescribes therapy where Joyce must revisit an unhappy past with her mom, it might be more than she can handle.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lindsey's Story
programme.desc: Lindsey Witte had it all: a white picket fence, a loving husband, a great job. Now her food addiction is threatening to ruin everything and embarks on a weight loss journey to save her life.

programme.title: Trading Spaces: All in the Family
programme.desc: One of the designers is tasked with working with her mom and sister to transform their neighbour’s space.

programme.title: Trading Spaces: Into the Woods
programme.desc: The designers head into the woods for some original, organic design inspiration. Plus, the winner of 'Training Spaces' joins Frank as his design assistant.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Mother's Day Surprise

programme.title: The First 48: Loved to Death/ Unmasked

programme.title: The First 48: Night Out/ One Gram
programme.desc: When a fight at a Charlotte nightclub escalates to gunfire, an innocent bystander is killed in the crossfire. Detective Terry Brandon and his team are forced to pit brother against brother to solve the murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Unarmed/ Bad Feeling
programme.desc: In Miami, an unarmed man is gunned down in the parking lot of a popular bar. In Dallas, a woman is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: The First 48: The Chase/ One Shot
programme.desc: A detective needs to determine whether two people seen fleeing a murder scene are witnesses or killers.

programme.title: The First 48: Shooting Spree/ Lady in the Fire
programme.desc: In Detroit, Anthony Wright Jr. investigates the death of a man found shot behind an abandoned house. Also, Sergeant Kevin Lundy in Memphis tries to solve the murder of a woman found dead inside a house after a fire.

programme.title: The First 48: Calling for a Killer/ Boiling Point
programme.desc: In Broward County, Fla., a highway shooting sends detectives on the hunt for a team of killers. Then in Dallas, a case of three friends executed outside a nightclub takes a turn when detectives discover it was caught on video.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Outdoor Entertaining
programme.desc: Amy hosts a Labor Day staff, optionally mandatory BBQ in Patty Hogg's backyard. The festivities take a turn when a mysterious drifter staggers into the yard. When he appears hold the answers to life's problems he wins the staff over, diverting from Amy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The guys look for partners in crime at a supermarket and throw caution to the wind as helpless romantics. Plus, tonight’s loser has a serious wardrobe malfunction.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Find out why the food court was picked for the 'stalk and text' challenge, what classic comedy inspired 'over the shoulder,' and who was lucky enough to test out the flying contraption for Joe the Genie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: At Home With Amy Sedaris: Outdoor Entertaining

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Framing Canon
programme.desc: Find out which magic team member knows how to ride a unicycle, what trick almost used an alpaca and which trick nearly resulted in Michael slicing open his neck.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Doughy Parts
programme.desc: Find out which trick was a nightmare for the crew to clean up. Plus, find out which trick Michael had to rehearse for weeks, and why he was really nervous on set.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Man vs. Winter
programme.desc: Season after season, the mountain men are locked in an endless battle against winter: the most dangerous predator of them all.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Outdoors: New Blood
programme.desc: Morgan and Margaret head North to track down the great caribou migration and secure meat for the winter. Marty prepares for the arrival of his daughter. Then, Jake starts his season tracking two lions, and Eustace uncovers some illicit activity on land.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Polar Vortex
programme.desc: A polar vortex gets in the way of Eustace and Raleigh's lumber business. While, Mike searches for meat in a bear-infested landscape. Then, Morgan and Margaret chase a migrating caribou, hoping to secure food for the winter. Jason searches for an iron ore.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Darkness Falls
programme.desc: As night falls on the mountains, Mike treks through bear country with meat on his back. Morgan battles dark terrain in a last-ditch effort to fill his freezer. Then, Jake heads into wolf territory, and Tom joins his brother for an all-night rifle build.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Family First
programme.desc: Jake will do whatever it takes to get his dog to the vet. Tom and Jack's ranch's well stops pumping. Morgan takes one last shot at a mountain sheep, and Mike goes back on the hunt after bears pillage his provisions, while Marty has a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Final Farewell
programme.desc: Jake sets off alone on the hunt for elk meat while Jason rolls the dice on an experimental smelter. Morgan and Margaret combat a critical water problem, Mike targets Kodiak Island's most dangerous quarry and Marty bids a final farewell.

programme.title: Mountain Men: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Eustace and Raleigh set out in search of a deer to replenish their food stores and Jason faces the moment of truth in his attempt to create his own steel. Meanwhile, Jake hauls 400 pounds of fresh elk meat out of the mountains.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Desperate Measures
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry head on a back country supply run where they battle time and rough terrain; Jake tracks down a repeat offender with his dogs; Tom's back to business in the Yaak; Mike checks his remote trapline for expensive fur, and more.

programme.title: Mountain Men: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Jake faces a problem lion and realizes it's not alone; Tom and Jack break down on the way to the Yaak Valley; Morgan crosses the Great Alaska Range on an emergency run; Jason jumpstarts his bladesmith business; Eustace and Raleigh are dealt a hard blow.

programme.title: Mountain Men: No Guts, No Glory
programme.desc: Kidd and Harry attempt to bag a buffalo; Jason and his son forge a new knife; Jake hunts a mountain lion that's too close to civilization; Morgan battles the deadly skies of Alaska to resupply his homestead.

programme.title: Snapped: Katharine Holmes
programme.desc: A woman complains about her ex-husband, but her venting has deadly consequences.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Debbie Hawk
programme.desc: When Debbie Hawk vanished, her friends and family were left searching for answers. Investigators discovered that before she went missing, Debbie planned to reveal secrets. Police wondered if silencing her was a motive for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Ambush
programme.desc: A dedicated Air Force Captain who had been deployed overseas for long stretches found himself caught in the crossfire of a love triangle at home. Investigators discovered a tale of obsession and passion.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Justice for Bonnie
programme.desc: When Bonnie Craig was found dead, police collected DNA but it didn't match anyone in the system. Then, twelve years later, there was a hit but the man was thousands of miles away. Turns out, prosecutors would need more than DNA to convict a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Infatuation
programme.desc: A talented, young art student was murdered. The killer left no fingerprints and no DNA. Police zeroed in on three fellow students and, soon, the dark portrait of a killer began to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Capture
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a journalist braving the world's most dangerous hotspots. Then, she became the story. What she endured from her captors was terrifying. Years later they found her again and secret agents put a daring undercover sting into action.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: For over a decade, El Chapo evaded authorities but one man was determined to catch the infamous kingpin. Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search and capture with never-before-seen videos and photographs.

programme.title: Snapped: Judy Parker
programme.desc: A business man's mysterious death sends police on a years-long investigation that leads to suspicions of those nearest and dearest to him.

programme.title: Snapped: Shannon Baugus
programme.desc: A wife refuses to watch a Star Wars cartoon with her husband, so he strikes her, and she strikes back.

programme.title: Snapped: Rennie Pratt
programme.desc: An Oakland hairdresser claims her boyfriend's death is an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Snapped: Brittany Norwood
programme.desc: An upscale store becomes a shop of horrors when a woman snaps and her co-worker is the victim of her rage.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Plot Thickens
programme.desc: It’s a true Hollywood whodunit. A show business stuntman was shot four times and left to die. Investigators uncovered a love story gone wrong and a villain with a dark secret. But the most stunning twist of all is what didn’t happen.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Denial
programme.desc: Raven Abaroa swooped into Vanessa Pond's life and stole her heart. Then Vanessa discovered her dream man had a tragic past. His first wife had been killed. Was he a grieving widower or somehow involved? Dark secrets were about to be spilled.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Fool Me Once, Fool Me Twice?
programme.desc: When a clock radio was found in a bathtub full of water with our victim, it's up to Kelly and Yolanda to determine if it was an accident or if she met with a more sinister fate.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Still of the Night (Pocatello, ID)
programme.desc: A sweet young woman was found brutally stabbed to death in her bedroom. Kelly and Yolanda are in the precarious position of finding her killer amidst multiple possible suspects.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Miss Congeniality (Yakima County, WA)
programme.desc: A young mother of three is found shot to death in her car that was pulled over on the side of a highway. Kelly and Yolanda face the difficult task of find a killer who seemed to disappear under the dark cover of night.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Devoted (Fort Walton Beach, FL)
programme.desc: A vivacious mother of two mysteriously vanishes from beautiful Fort Walton Beach, FL. Just three days later, several people receive a cryptic group text from her but never hear from her again.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Room #10
programme.desc: The Cold Justice team returns to Fort Myers, FL to put their investigative skills to work on a 22-year-old murder case of a woman found shot in the head, covered in bloody sheets and dumped behind a community rec center.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Trajectory
programme.desc: The team is back in small town America where they hope to uncover the truth behind the mysterious death of a young man that occurred just a few years ago. State police from across the country will try to help get to the bottom of what really happened.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Fresh Wounds
programme.desc: Facing their oldest case yet, Kelly and team head to Mississippi to find out if the tragic shooting death of a young man was a suicide, accident, or murder. It’s a Cold Justice first when local law enforcement exhumes the body of the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Kathleen Wise
programme.desc: A nurse's turbulent marriage flatlines when her husband dies from a lethal dose of liquid morphine.

programme.title: Movie: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring

programme.desc: An in-depth look at the technology and engineering necessary to live underwater, also being used to help shore up existing cities and pushing the limits of housing construction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: How It's Made: World's Toughest Keg
programme.desc: Steel kegs are essential to the world's beer industry, and the process to make them requires cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: King Tut's Final Secrets
programme.desc: The most famous Egyptian king in history ruled for only 10 years before his mysterious death. Using 3-D CT-scan imaging, National Geographic reveals what King Tutankhamun looked like on the day he died and unveils new findings relating to his death.

programme.title: To Be Announced
programme.desc: Programming to be announced.

programme.title: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Doomsday Prophecy
programme.desc: A cutting-edge archaeological investigation reveals if the Dead Sea Scrolls foretold the final battle between the Jewish rebels and the Roman Empire. Using the latest science, experts uncover if the other prophecies from the ancient text came true.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Satan's Catacombs
programme.desc: An abandoned system of caves was once the meeting place of a secret society that worshiped Satan and performed black magic. New discoveries at this mysterious site reveal what really happened here and why a Founding Father was a frequent guest.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Devil's Prison
programme.desc: A haunted prison with a terrifying past once housed America's most notorious criminals, but today, the fortress stands in ruin, and experts reveal evidence of ghostly secrets hidden in the crumbling jailhouse walls.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: A Way Out
programme.desc: An investigation into the missing persons case of 13-year-old Jessyca Mullenberg.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Young professional Sasha Samsudean comes home from a night out in downtown Orlando and is brutally murdered in her own apartment. Detectives must now turn to video surveillance footage to unravel the mystery and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Evil Fantasy
programme.desc: When three men from Toronto's close knit LGTB community vanish in 2012, Detective Hank Idsinga uncovers the most dangerous network of cyber predators that he's experienced in his thirty year career.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Evil Fantasy
programme.desc: When three men from Toronto's close knit LGTB community vanish in 2012, Detective Hank Idsinga uncovers the most dangerous network of cyber predators that he's experienced in his thirty year career.

programme.title: See No Evil: Can I Help You?
programme.desc: In July 2013, shopkeeper Imran Ashgar is suddenly shot dead in his store in Columbus, Ohio. With the shooting caught on camera and the killers on the run, detectives are in an urgent race against time to capture them before they strike again.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Evil Fantasy
programme.desc: When three men from Toronto's close knit LGTB community vanish in 2012, Detective Hank Idsinga uncovers the most dangerous network of cyber predators that he's experienced in his thirty year career.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Evil Fantasy
programme.desc: When three men from Toronto's close knit LGTB community vanish in 2012, Detective Hank Idsinga uncovers the most dangerous network of cyber predators that he's experienced in his thirty year career.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Look of Summer
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill, detectives race to discover the killer behind the brutal crime. With no leads, police turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's chilling attempt to cover his tracks.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Naughty or Nice
programme.desc: Yamisha Thomas is a married woman who hasn't given up her party-girl lifestyle. Her husband's efforts to control her only have the opposite effect, pushing her into the arms of someone else. Will Yamisha's reckless decisions come back to haunt her?

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Fatal Prophet
programme.desc: Pastor Tracy and his wife Pauletta look like the perfect 'Baptist power couple' - until Tracy falls for Tyonne, a close friend of his son William. Their sinful, not-so-secret affair sends shockwaves through the congregation and ends in murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Black Pearl
programme.desc: Tammy Ellis likes bad boys and charismatic loner David Gatlin is right up her street. After a quickie marriage, David's dark history is revealed; an attempted divorce is the catalyst for a terrifying and bloody confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Broken Dreams
programme.desc: The only thing going for Christina Corrigan is Keith Belajonas, a cute 25-year-old she meets online. After a couple of years and kids, they marry. But the honeymoon won't last long, and the jagged edges of their broken dreams will lead to a blood bath.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Lethal Romance
programme.desc: An ambitious Harlem couple dreams of a better life for themselves. Unfortunately they're stuck in a bitter cycle of poverty poor health and mistrust leading one of them to decide to put their dreams to rest, forever.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Other Side of the Tracks
programme.desc: When Ed Postma, a Florida truck driver with a bad boy reputation, meets single mom Jackie Rosser, sparks fly. But when Ed straightens out to become a family man, new bad boys are waiting, and the spark dies, taking another casualty as collateral damage.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Living in Sin
programme.desc: A Christian woman's faith is tested when she falls in love with a charming new female co-worker. As the forbidden lovers fight for their love in a community that doesn't want them, the pressure proves too much, and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Bound by Honor
programme.desc: Love and tradition collide when a young woman forbidden from dating falls for a handsome stranger. She knows she must keep her relationship hidden from her orthodox father and protective brother.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Family Matters
programme.desc: Puppy love is thwarted when a teen boy's traditional parents try to keep the young couple apart by moving him to another country. But the distance only serves to make his heart grow fonder and he'll stop at nothing to be reunited with his girl.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love or Family
programme.desc: A high school romance must be kept a secret from a domineering father with traditional values. When the truth comes out, a heartbreaking choice between love and family brings devastating consequences.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Fortress of War
programme.desc: The Story of how two CIA operatives, in search of Osama bin Laden, stop a Taliban uprising in an Afghan fortress. They are outnumbered leaving one operative to pay the ultimate price.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished
programme.desc: Examine some of the most famous cases of disappearances that have gone on to spawn conspiracy theories to explain them. John Bingham, 7th Earl of Lucan, union leader Jimmy Hoffa and Robert Maxwell come under discussion.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Vanished

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Castro and the Cold Cream
programme.desc: The true story of how the CIA turned Fidel Castro's lover into a deadly assassin and sent her on a mission to kill their formidable enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow are among the most famous outlaws in history. Murderers and hold-up artists, the pair robbed numerous banks, gas stations and stores in rural areas and killed at least nine people during their spree.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: George Francis Barnes J, better known as 'Machine Gun Kelly,' was an Irish American gangster during the Prohibition era. His nickname came from his favourite weapon, a Thompson submachine gun.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: John Dillinger
programme.desc: John Dillinger was the most brazen of the infamous criminals of the Great Depression, and probably the most brutal, credited with a string of bank robberies and at least a dozen murders across Indiana in 1933.

programme.title: Natural Born Outlaws: Pretty Boy Floyd
programme.desc: Notorious criminal 'Pretty Boy' Floyd was involved in over 30 bank robberies and perhaps as many as 20 murders.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Gourmet Holiday
programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: In the Kitchen With David: PM Edition
programme.desc: Cooking & Fun with Program Host David Venable.

programme.title: Susan Graver Style
programme.desc: Easy-care, easy-wear fashions are available in mix-and-match colours and patterns.

programme.title: Beauty by Tova
programme.desc: Fragrance and skincare from international beauty authority Tova Borgnine.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors With Dan
programme.desc: Featuring tools, entertainment, gardening, and more with Dan Hughes.

programme.title: Home Made Easy With Mary
programme.desc: Simple cook and home ideas with host Mary DeAngelis.

programme.title: Organized Options
programme.desc: Store solutions, bags, hangers and more for all your organizing needs.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike and Michael rush to finish the Country House before winter hits, but their schedule and budget are tested when an open permit, left on the barn by previous owners, is discovered.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.desc: An over-ambitious couple bit off more than they could chew with their cottage fixer-upper. With plants growing out of the foundation and peeled paint on the siding, it's up to Chris and Sara to save this uninhabitable eyesore.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Mother-Daughter Showdown
programme.desc: The fur flies when Aphrodite and Bethany take on Kelly and Noelle.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: You May Now Flip the Bride
programme.desc: Stylish lovebirds, Princess and Mark Anthony, compete against designing darlings, Simone and Christian.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Bilingual Beauties vs. Flip-Sters
programme.desc: Professional flip-sters, Jen and Kyle go head-to-head with bilingual beauties, Lindsay and Marizol (they might speak Spanish and Creole, but their first language is bargaining).

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: The Moose Is Loose!
programme.desc: Junkologists Scoop and Moose take on flea market-obsessed besties Sarah and Regina.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Seeing Orange
programme.desc: Chris and JJ battle with besties Jessica and Melissa.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: A Chandelier Made of a Metal Orb Against a Sink Transformed Into a Mini Bar
programme.desc: Sisters encounter stylist friends in a battle of flipping.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Turn Up the Radio!
programme.desc: Neighbours Frank and Patrick take on stylish husband wife team of Marc and Tiffany.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Bringing the Bling!
programme.desc: Flashy upcyclers Darren and Stephan go to battle with stylish siblings Rose and Sophie. Each pair gets $500 to find, fix-up and flip items purchased at the Brimfield Antique Show in Brimfield, Massachusetts.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Holy Cow Table!
programme.desc: Designers and friends Ingrid and Candace take on the husband-wife team of Ed and Lisa.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Mus-Stache for Cash
programme.desc: Experienced flippers, Brenda and Mark are ready to take on designing sweethearts, Lauren and Ben.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tuscan Wonderwall
programme.desc: The Pool Kings are faced with a dilapidated 1980s-style pool and a family that wants a beautiful yard where they can cook outside. They rip out the old pool and build a Tuscan beauty with multiple overflows and glass detail work.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cabanas and Cannonballs
programme.desc: A couple who recently moved into a new house in Austin, Texas, has decided it's finally time to build the family pool of their kids' dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Gotta Have My Grotto
programme.desc: A young family from Carlsbad, California wants a nice backyard where the kids can play. Mike and Jim are up for the challenge and build a power-packed pool with a spa, underwater volcano, custom slide and a Tuscan grotto.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: They say everything's bigger in Texas, and the pools are no exception. The Pool Kings are facing a big backyard and even bigger expectations from their interior design client.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Lake View Paradise
programme.desc: A couple wants to build their daughter a backyard oasis that also accentuates their beautiful lake views.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Alton Brown, Claire Robinson, and more reveal where they get the best fried chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beef, Belly, Bacon and Bourbon
programme.desc: In Savannah, Ga., Michael Symon starts with sweet and savory pork belly sliders with bacon jam and bourbon sauce, nestled inside a fluffy doughnut bun.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Too Hot to Handle
programme.desc: Roger meets two talented chefs who own two spectacular outdoor cooking rigs.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Washington, D.C.
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern looks at the diverse and monumental eats that define Washington, DC. Full of vibrant communities, DC boasts gastronomy that includes local oysters, Ethiopian chicken stew, spicy Chinese stir-fry and chilli-smothered sausages.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Warsaw
programme.desc: In Poland's capital city of Warsaw, the Slavic culture is rich and the hearty food sticks with you through the winter. From pierogi to zapiekanka to paczki, Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic eats that Poles hold as tradition.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tuscany
programme.desc: Andrew explores the cuisine of Tuscany, Italy, which is rooted in the tradition of 'cucina povera' or food made with local, high quality ingredients.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dublin
programme.desc: In a city celebrated for its beloved beverages, Dublin, Ireland's, food does not disappoint. Andrew Zimmern examines edible Irish icons from smoked salmon, soda bread and stew to boxty, black pudding and, of course, Guinness.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Dumpster Sex

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: When Deke invites Max's friends over for a gathering at his dumpster, Caroline learns an enormous secret about his background.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the ATM
programme.desc: Max decides to break-up with Deke now that she knows about his wealthy background.

programme.title: Family Matters: Brown Bombshell

programme.title: Family Matters: Woman of the People

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: P.T. & A.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Doorman

programme.desc: Phoebe's former flame returns from Russia for a night and hopes to rekindle their romance.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Rosita Dies
programme.desc: Phoebe's first day as a telemarketer turns bizarre when she meets her distraught manager.

programme.title: Ancient Skies: Our Place in the Universe

programme.desc: BBC correspondent Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's award-winning hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour

programme.title: Cycle of Health
programme.desc: Explores stories of personal triumph over major health challenges.

programme.title: Second Opinion: Taking Charge of Your Health Care: Depression
programme.desc: Depression is a treatable brain disease, but while 25 million people in the U.S. suffer from depression, there is still a stigma surrounding the disease, and this prevents people from reaching out for help.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: Widowed Sydney newspaper columnist George Turner sets out to make a fresh start.

programme.title: 800 Words
programme.desc: George gets an unlikely message from beyond the grave. Hannah tries to convince Tom she'd be a top cop.

programme.title: Last Tango in Halifax
programme.desc: Alan and Celia’s first day as husband and wife is filled with tension. A new arrival surprises everyone, most of all Gillian. Caroline finds a way to buy John out of the house, but Kate's desire to have a baby threatens things.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: Variety Studio: Actors on Actors: Eddie Murphy/ Antonio Banderas & Scarlett Johansson/ Chris Evans
programme.desc: Eddie Murphy (Dolemite is My Name) with Antonio Banderas (Pain & Glory); Scarlett Johansson (Marriage Story) with Chris Evans (Knives Out); Mindy Kaling (Late Night) with Constance Wu (Hustlers).

programme.title: 10 That Changed America: 10 Towns That Changed America

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth's Secret Agents
programme.desc: Twelve years into Elizabeth's reign, the Pope declares her a heretic, which in the hearts of England's Catholics gives them permission to kill her. Queen Elizabeth looks to her spymaster William Cecil to stop the Catholic assassins getting through.

programme.title: Operation Maneater: Great White Shark
programme.desc: Evans wants to find non-lethal solutions to keep people and sharks safe. He enters the water to attach tracking tags to great whites; joins beach patrol teams searching for sharks; and tests a new 'multi-spectral' camera that spots sharks from the air.

programme.title: WWII Mega Weapons: The Tunnels of Okinawa

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Tone and Stretch
programme.desc: Mary Ann uses a towel, large ball and weights to guide viewers through a full body workout.

programme.title: Cyberchase: A Crinkle in Time

programme.desc: A science expedition becomes a rescue mission Nina when Nina hurts her ankle and needs to be airlifted home. Then, Molly gets lost on her way to Juneau, and must think about instructions given by her Elders to get back on track.

programme.title: Nova: Last B-24
programme.desc: In 1944, the Tulsamerican B-24 bomber disappeared off the coast of Croatia. The plane was a WW2 icon – the last B-24 built in Tulsa, and paid for by the factory workers. The daring mission to survey the wreckage and recover the lost airmen.

programme.title: History Detectives: Mysteries From the Wild West
programme.desc: Did a biography of legendary frontiersman Kit Carson once belong to members of his family? A saddle tells the story of Yakima Canutt. What is the meaning behind the mysterious inscription on sheet music of the popular western song 'Tumbling Tumbleweeds'.

programme.title: SuperNature: Wild Flyers: Crowded Skies
programme.desc: The sky is a crowded world where mammals, birds and insects hunt, escape, mate, defend territory, sleep and even die on the wing. Survival up there depends not just on beating gravity or mastering flight, but also out-flying the competition.

programme.title: Life From Above: Moving Planet
programme.desc: Satellites follow an elephant family struggling through drought, reveal previously unknown emperor penguin colonies, and discover mysterious ice rings that could put seal pups in danger.

programme.title: Nova: Last B-24
programme.desc: In 1944, the Tulsamerican B-24 bomber disappeared off the coast of Croatia. The plane was a WW2 icon – the last B-24 built in Tulsa, and paid for by the factory workers. The daring mission to survey the wreckage and recover the lost airmen.

programme.title: The Great American Read: Heroes
