programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing
programme.desc: Martin's radio fans love it when Gina and Martin have arguments on the show and Stan wants to permanently hire Gina as Martin's co- host.

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus
programme.desc: Martin reluctantly agrees to dress up as Santa Claus for Tommy's 'Big Brother' program.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part One)
programme.desc: Martin and Gina break up after an argument over a Valentine's Day gift.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Two)
programme.desc: After the breakup with Gina, Cole and Tommy take Martin out to meet new women.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)
programme.desc: Realizing he made a mistake, Martin tries to win Gina back.

programme.title: Martin: Credit Card Blues
programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: What's Will Got to Do With It?
programme.desc: Will starts wheeling and dealing as Ashley's manager until she develops an enormous ego.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Reality Bites
programme.desc: Will gets into a brawl with Dougie the Whale in front of a group of young children.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Grumpy Young Men
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get into a fight over a girl, but in the end their friendship prevails.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Fresh Prince, the Movie
programme.desc: When Will witnesses a murder, he and his family are put in the witness protection program.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Misery
programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Ashley realizes that there is more to life than the controlled environment she lives in.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Sooooooooul Train
programme.desc: Philip and Vivian have been named one of the 25 most memorable couples of Soul Train.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Will's ego takes a beating when Lisa has to beat up a guy for him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Up the Dirt Road
programme.desc: Will gets sued while trying to impress Lisa by taking pictures of celebrity homes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Steps Out
programme.desc: Will decides to fight fire-with-fire when he suspects that Lisa is dating another guy.

programme.title: Movie: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: When a fashion-driven sorority girl is dumped by her boyfriend, she decides to follow him to law school. Harvard doesn't know what to do when Elle and her dog take the Ivy League institution by storm.

programme.title: Movie: 27 Dresses
programme.desc: A perennial bridesmaid struggles to accept that her sister is marrying her secret crush.

programme.title: Movie: Stop the Wedding
programme.desc: A young single attorney finds out her mother is marrying a TV star and tries to stop it.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Hearts
programme.desc: A Montana rancher learns he is the heir of a late King and has inherited the throne.

programme.title: Movie: Matching Hearts
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, a matchmaker is tasked by her mentor to find a match for an entrepreneur who believes staying single is the key to success.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: Frasier: Bla-Z-Boy
programme.desc: Frasier chafes at the notion that he and his father are like an old married couple.

programme.title: Frasier: The Two Hundredth Episode
programme.desc: While toasting his 2000th radio show, Frasier discovers his collection is short one tape.

programme.title: Frasier: Sharing Kirby
programme.desc: Wine connoisseurs Frasier and Niles vie for control of the incompetent teenager, Kirby.

programme.title: Frasier: Junior Agent
programme.desc: Frasier feels the heat when a younger, more aggressive psychiatrist is out-rating him.

programme.title: Frasier: Bully for Martin
programme.desc: Martin is verbally abused at his job and a protective Frasier meddles and complains.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Mother Load
programme.desc: Niles and Daphne's domestic bliss is ruined by disruptive, interfering and conniving relatives.

programme.title: Frasier: Juvenilia
programme.desc: Frasier hooks up with generation Y, but the teen scene has him on the run.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Wants New Furniture
programme.desc: Lucy tries to hide some new furniture she bought without Ricky's permission in the kitchen. Discovering his wife's extravagant purchase, Ricky insists that Lucy pays for it from her allowance.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Camping Trip
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel invite themselves on a rugged camping trip with their spouses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky and Fred Are TV Fans
programme.desc: Ricky and Fred never want to do anything but watch the fights on TV.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Never Do Business With Friends
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes almost ruin their friendship over a washing machine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Josie Bissett and Jack Wagner from the Hallmark original movie 'Wedding March 5: My Boyfriend's Back' stop by. Plus, actress Megan Hilty visits and food and lifestyle expert Brandi Milloy makes a donut cake for National Donut Day.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: Movie: A Harvest Wedding
programme.desc: A wedding planner in New York is hired to plan the most anticipated wedding of the season. But the bride wants the wedding to be on the family farm which is now being run by her older brother who happens to be her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Royal Matchmaker
programme.desc: A struggling NYC matchmaker is hired by a king to find his son a suitable wife in time for a national celebration.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Loyalty
programme.desc: Dwight tries to prevent Darryl from moving to Athlead; Jim misses Cece's recital when a big investor visits his new company.

programme.title: The Office: Junior Salesman
programme.desc: David tasks Dwight with finding a new part time salesman to fill in for Jim. Meanwhile, Pam tries to figure out who will be her new desk mate and Erin tries to find her birth parents with Pete's help.

programme.title: The Office: Vandalism
programme.desc: When Pam asks the office to help her track down the vandal who defaced her mural, Dwight and Nellie spring to action. Darryl has difficulty dealing with the cleanliness habits of Jim in their shared Philly apartment.

programme.title: The Office: Couples Discount
programme.desc: The office pairs off into pretend couples to take advantage of a Valentine's Day discount at a local mini mall.

programme.title: The Office: Moving On
programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.

programme.title: The Office: Moving On
programme.desc: Pam interviews for a job in Philadelphia with a manager who gives her deja vu. Dwight brings Angela with him on a mission to clean his elderly Aunt Shirley.

programme.title: The Office: The Farm
programme.desc: Dwight travels home for a customary Schrute funeral. He and his siblings receive a surprise inheritance that's not entirely unwelcome. Back at Dunder Mifflin, Todd Packer tries to make amends for his lifetime of bad behaviour.

programme.title: The Office: Promos
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about the new promos running on TV for the documentary. Jim interviews a baseball player.

programme.title: Key & Peele: East/ West Bowl Rap
programme.desc: Sketches include All-Stars from the East/West bowl rap, the guys playing mobsters, and the two valet guys can 't believe anyone would mess with the Batman.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Non-Stop Party
programme.desc: Sketches include a guy chasing his girlfriend to the ends of the Earth, and LMFAO literally cannot stop partying.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meagan’s Fight
programme.desc: Sketches include: the return of Meagan, Jordan trying to look cool at a strip club, and the guys putting on a funk show for the ages.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Meegan and Andre Break Up
programme.desc: Two friends get into a beef at a club, Meegan and André have a serious talk, a rapper walks out of an interview, Conrad flies business select and Keegan has a new mustache.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: May 21, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Stairmageddon
programme.desc: Everyone is upset when the elevator goes out of service and they must take the stairs.

programme.title: South Park: Trapper Keeper
programme.desc: Cartman is elated to have a new, multi-functional Trapper Keeper, the Ultra Keeper Futura S2000. A mysterious stranger warns Cartman that, unless they destroy it, his Trapper Keeper will eventually take over the world and destroy humankind.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.desc: Kyle invites Kenny to join him and Ike at Jewbilee, a camp for Jewish kids, where they make various arts and crafts as tribute to the great and powerful Moses.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Black List
programme.desc: When Deacon starts hanging out with James, Doug is convinced he is being replaced.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wish Boned
programme.desc: Doug is ecstatic when he wins two tickets to the NCAA Final Four basketball tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Van Go
programme.desc: Holly discovers that Carrie used her for her van; Doug argues with a feisty waitress.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ice Cubed
programme.desc: Guilt gets the better of Carrie when she seeks refuge from a blizzard in a church.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Catching Hell
programme.desc: While at a Mets game, Doug spills mayonnaise on one of Carrie's most important clients.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: Carrie is upset with Doug when she learns that a free TV was the reason for their getaway.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buy Curious
programme.desc: When their neighbour dies, Carrie decides it's time for them to enter the real estate game.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Harvey-Woodruff Family
programme.desc: The Military Makeover construction team is in full swing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Present Tense
programme.desc: When the Heffernans receive an oil painting of themselves as an anniversary gift from Deacon and Kelly, they dislike the picture so much that they decide to stage a robbery rather than hang the painting in their home.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sold-Y Locks
programme.desc: Doug convinces Carrie to sell her hair to a wigmaker so they can afford to go on a cruise with Deacon and Kelly. Meanwhile, when Arthur sees Carrie's new haircut, he starts thinking that she might not be his biological daughter.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Emotional Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Doug lies to Carrie and tells her that he regrets not accomplishing more in life and that he's going to sign up for the IPS management program. Meanwhile, Deacon, Arthur and Spence have a wonderful time at the amusement park riding 'Goliath.'

programme.title: The King of Queens: Four Play
programme.desc: When Doug realizes he has more in common with Deacon's wife than Deacon, he and Kelley start hanging out together. Meanwhile, Arthur feels betrayed by the coffee shop girl, Gloria, who is having great success by taking Arthur's relationship advice.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hartford Wailer
programme.desc: Carrie convinces her female co-workers to blow off a company retreat and take advantage of the hotel's spa. However, her plans are put into jeopardy when Doug surprises her and wants to spend the weekend watching the Planet of the Apes series.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fight Schlub
programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Inside Pocket
programme.desc: An insurance agent is shot execution style in his office in broad daylight but the killer leaves no fingerprints and there is no murder weapon found at the scene. Then, investigators discover a critical clue invisible to the naked eye.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Last Gasp
programme.desc: After a young mom is found brutally murdered in her home, investigators find startling clues on her cell phone that could lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Yes, in Deed
programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Guarded Secrets
programme.desc: A security guard disappears from work without a trace, and investigators can't determine if he left willingly or if foul play was involved.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Calculated Coincidence
programme.desc: There is little evidence at the crime scene until investigators discover a link between their prime suspect and an unsolved murder committed six years earlier in a different state.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sworded Scheme
programme.desc: A college student goes missing, and investigators discover blood spatter in her boyfriend’s bedroom. Blood spatter someone has gone to great lengths to conceal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: The Kitchen Window
programme.desc: A small beach-town community is frightened when a young waitress is found stabbed more than 100 times in her apartment.

programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Dance
programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Naked and Ghosted
programme.desc: In a brutal Mexican jungle known to be haunted by Mayan spirits, All-star survivalists Sarah and Trent are tormented by rain, predators and spirits of the rainforest. Then, two strangers try to survive in the crosshairs of Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Colombian Jungle
programme.desc: In this Pop-Up Edition, a mom and National Guard vet teams up with a firefighter. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as they are forced to huddle in bat-infested caves during violent storms. A survivalist and a wild monkey develop a bond.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: African Hunting Ground
programme.desc: In this Pop-Up Edition: A biker chick and a taxidermist have to stay on the move to survive an African hunting ground. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as the pair pushes across 21 miles of savannah to find food and water and avoid lions.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Banished: Ready Set Go
programme.desc: Twelve survivalists embark on a punishing 40-day challenge in an African location where tribes lived by a simple principle: banish the weak. Deadly crocodiles and territorial leopards circle and temperatures soar, revealing who may be banished first.

programme.title: Naked Castaway: Give Me Shelter
programme.desc: As Ed's physical health deteriorates, so does his mental state and loneliness begins to take its toll.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Uncensored: Chilled to the Bone
programme.desc: Hypothermia threatens both a fan survivalist in the mountains of Bulgaria and a military duo in Ontario, Canada. The air is frigid and there are predators all around but unsuspected challenges prove to be their biggest threats.

programme.title: Naked Castaway: Give Me Shelter
programme.desc: As Ed's physical health deteriorates, so does his mental state and loneliness begins to take its toll.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Flesh and Blood
programme.desc: From a Spanish Inquisition stronghold of sadism to a haunted theater in Memphis, Tennessee, Josh explores six locations where flesh and blood were shed, but the dead are not forgotten.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: What Lurks Within
programme.desc: From a lake in India with connections to alien life to a train station in Spain where a mild-mannered customs clerk took on the Nazis, Josh uncovers the mysteries of what lurks within six extraordinary locations around the globe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Real Robin Hood
programme.desc: Josh criss-crosses the English countryside in search of the real Robin Hood.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Josh Gates Tonight: The Merry Adventures of Josh Gates
programme.desc: While exploring British legends, Josh is joined by three legends of the silver screen: Robin Hood himself Cary Elwes, River Monster's Jeremy Wade and Monty Python's Terry Gilliam. To understand life during the middle ages, Josh dons a suit of armor.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Cursed Lake of Gold
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the wilds of Namibia to embark on a treacherously deep dive in Lake Otjikoto for a long lost World War I treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of the Dead Sea Scrolls
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Holy Land to dig in with an archaeologist who has recently discovered new Dead Sea Scrolls. Josh also sees cutting-edge technology restore scroll fragments in a way that could change how we read the Bible.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Copper Scroll
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates a unique Dead Sea Scroll etched with riddles that could lead to an ancient treasure. Following new leads, Josh treks into the punishing Jordanian desert in search of the potential fortune.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Dawn of the Dredge
programme.desc: Summer temperatures at an all time high disrupt the seafloor, causing miners to find new strategies. Shawn fights a legal battle. Ken tries to keep his gold crown, while Emily and the Kellys look to expand their operations.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Will Victoria Say Yes?
programme.desc: Theresa brings Victoria and the whole family on an excursion to choose a wedding dress. Then, Theresa reunites a hearing-impaired client with the loved ones who supported her. Later, Theresa visits a jail to read an inmate separated from her by glass.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Stars and Spirits
programme.desc: Theresa's in Hollywood to read stars of the past and present. 80's superstar Taylor Dayne, Say Yes To The Dress Atlanta's Monte Durham, The Office's Kate Flannery, Roseanne's Michael Fishman, and Family Matters' dad Reginald VelJohnson.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Drinks Nail Polish/ Ear Digger
programme.desc: Bertha has been drinking up to five bottles of nail polish every day for the past five years. Jamie can't stop digging in her ears.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Couch Cushion/ Furry
programme.desc: Lauren can't go to a social event without wearing her fur suit. Adele has been eating couch cushions for twenty years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Rampant Rats/ Extreme Fingernails
programme.desc: Theresa has more than 60 pet hairless rats that are taking over her tiny studio apartment. Meanwhile, 48-year old, Jazz has been growing her fingernails for 22 years. Her longest nail is two feet long, and she calls them her children.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Cat Food/ Smells Mothballs
programme.desc: Mary consumes over 900 cat treats and several cans of wet food every day. Alicia has been addicted to smelling mothballs for 15 years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Wears Diapers/ Eats Dryer Sheets
programme.desc: For Riley, there's nothing like the comfort of wearing a warm, wet diaper. She chooses to live as an adult baby to escape the stress of the real world. And Charmissa stuffs her bra with the dryer sheets she chews on for up to 10 hours a day.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Pony Play/ Addicted to Drinking Paint
programme.desc: A single mother of two has been addicted to drinking paint for nearly three years.

programme.title: My Strange Addiction: Eats Cleanser/ Tanner
programme.desc: Crystal has been eating household cleanser every day since she was twelve. Samantha tans up to three times daily.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Quint in Crisis
programme.desc: When Hazel undergoes eye surgery, Adam and Danielle must anxiously wait to find out if it was a success. Meanwhile at home, life is chaotic as usual as Blayke prepares for kindergarten and Mimi officially moves in.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Worst. Hot Sauce. Ever
programme.desc: Two comic book guys go against two twerkin' besties. The 'Constrictor Sauce' knocks the comic book guys to their knees, but the keep fighting for the prize.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Suck, Slap or Sauce
programme.desc: A couple faces off against a pair of fishing cousins to see who will take $25,000 home. Once Chef Willie and Sean open their tackle box of hot sauces, even easy questions will become nearly impossible.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Los Angeles: Housewarming Home Wreckers
programme.desc: Britten and Kendra bond over their biracial backgrounds. Shanique blindsides Robert with her desire for a life change. Kendra is excited to show off her new home but isn't prepared for a messy showdown.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Los Angeles: Hollywood Night of Terror
programme.desc: It’s Halloween in the city of Angels. Britten, Mack and the kids experience their first LA trick-or-treat theatrics. Kendra gives Hobart a fright when she gives him news that may upend their lives. Imani is haunted by her wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Los Angeles: Homecoming Queens
programme.desc: Kendra enlists the help of wildlife and wine to mend Shanique and Lia's broken friendship. Imani and Britten take off for New Orleans to meet up with Contessa for Xavier’s homecoming weekend. Imani opens up about her dark past and relationship struggles.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: At It Again
programme.desc: Chopped Champions Seis Kamimura and Demetrio Zavala try to beat Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rotten Tomatoes for Bobby
programme.desc: Chopped judge Scott Contant and actress Helene Yorke are out for blood. Chefs Andre Fowles and Darren Saypharaj battle to get to Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Don't Sugarcoat It
programme.desc: Best Baker's Marcela Valladolid pairs up with the Cake Boss himself, Buddy Valastro, to try and score a sweet victory against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grapes of Wrath
programme.desc: 'Chopped's' Alex Guarnaschelli and Cake Boss Buddy Valastro don't sugarcoat their desire to take down Bobby Flay. The princess of pastry Paulette Goto and sweet sensation Zac Young return for a chance at revenge.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Cream Of The Crop
programme.desc: The kitchen comes alive when Food Network's Katie Lee and Valerie Bertinelli team up to see Bobby Flay fall. It's up to them to make the call when Chef Chris Henry from Massachusetts battles Buffalo, N.Y.'s Chef Steve Gedra for a chance at the champ!

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Snaked Out
programme.desc: The kitchen gets steamy when Derek Simcik, named Sexiest Chef, goes up against Philadelphia's haute chef, Sylva Senat. Chopped's Chris Santos and Marc Murphy choose which chef will burn Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Keeping It Real
programme.desc: Ted Allen from 'Chopped' and TV host Jeannie Mai are keeping it real with Bobby, and they want a win. They stack the deck with two authentic cuisine experts, chefs Ryan DePersio and Giuseppe Fanelli, who want Bobby begging for Mamma Mia after they win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All in the Family
programme.desc: Sassy Miami chef Mika Leon brings the heat against Atlanta chef Michael Bertozzi. Chef Carla Hall and actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson decide who has what it takes to join their modern family for a food fight against Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Back on Track in Glendora
programme.desc: Robert Irvine heads to T. Phillips Alehouse and Grill in Glendora, California and finds a restaurant that looks more like a dive bar. Owner Jen can't stand up for herself and everyone walks all over her.

programme.title: Summer Rush: The Rush Begins
programme.desc: The Foy family prepares for the big July 4th weekend on Lake George in New York, and tension mounts as they get their menus and staff ready for the huge holiday crowds. If this weekend doesn't go right, they'll be paying for it for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clear the Deck
programme.desc: It's all hands-on deck when Napa Valley's Daniel Gomez Sanchez competes against Atlanta's Matthew Ridgway. TV host Daphne Oz and Food Network's Eddie Jackson hold nothing back when it comes to slaying Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Finding Stars
programme.desc: Food Network's Giada De Laurentiis and People Magazine's Jess Cagle reach for the stars when they match up Atlanta's dynamic Greek chef Pano Karatassos and New York City's Mimi Weissenborn to take down Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Route 66

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Layers of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's firin' up the grill and stacking up the flavour. In Toronto, Canada, the restored diner cooking up pork belly, a mac and cheese burger and a Christmas burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eurocentric
programme.desc: Guy feasts on the many tastes of Europe in places across the country.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Prodigal Son

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Twenty-five-foot waves test the mettle of rookie skipper Josh Harris, but it's fire not water that threatens to sink his 128-foot Cornelia Marie. On the Wizard, a mutinous crew faces off with Captain Keith. Sig Hansen gets an unwelcome surprise.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Brotherhood Tested
programme.desc: King Crab season kicks off with a 12 million pound Bairdi quota increase that causes a Derby style fishing frenzy, a boat is stolen the night before launch, and the unlikeliest of alliances is born.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Busted buoys, broken pots, and a blown engine have put the Northwestern more than a week behind schedule but Captain Sig hopes Lady Luck will smile upon him as he drops all of his gear far north of the rest of the fleet.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Trials of the Greenhorns
programme.desc: Greenhorns are put to the test as the Bering Sea's harsh winter weather deteriorates. Guy, the Wizard horn has only worked three days and is already faltering; but the Northwestern and Cornelia Marie greenhorns step up to prove their worth.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Ice and Open Water

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Frozen Finish
programme.desc: It the finale for the greenhorns and some have succeeded in their quests to become Bering Sea crab fisherman while others won't be coming back. The 2007 Opilio crab tallies are in and a winner is declared.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Eye of the Tigerfish
programme.desc: The guys head deep into Zambia, chasing reports of large tigerfish - a fierce freshwater predator - in an uncharted river. The only thing standing in their way is 400 miles of unpaved roads, crocodiles, hippos and a serious lack of fuel.

programme.title: Fish or Die: The Four Norsemen
programme.desc: The team follows a lead to an extremely remote river in Greenland, believed to hold massive Arctic char. With its barren tundra, towering fjords, and ice-carved valleys, they discover Greenland is wilderness at its most pure and most dangerous.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Pirates of Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Off the extreme eastern tip of Papua New Guinea lies Milne Bay. It's rumored to be home to huge schools of one of the greatest sportfish ever, the giant trevally. Trying to hook and land a giant trevally on a fly rod will be the ultimate test.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Tacos and Tarpon
programme.desc: When the team heard reports of an untouched mecca for tarpon in Mexico, they were all over it. To get to these untouched 'Silver Kings,' the crew needs to navigate a maze of croc and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four friends begin a challenging jungle expedition in search of a giant golden dorado, possibly dwelling within a remote Bolivian river. To find their way there, they must conquer torrential rains, vicious insects and isolated tribes.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Ice Age Predator
programme.desc: Tales of monstrous, man-sized pike have persisted in Europe for generations. Now, Jeremy Wade is on a journey to catch this prehistoric monster, starting in the lakes of Ireland and leading to unfished waters on the edge of the Arctic Circle in Sweden.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Alaska's Lost River Kings
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Alaska to investigate the disappearance of the majestic king salmon. His search will take him through the heart of grizzly bear territory, remote native communities and ultimately the Pacific Ocean as he follows a trail of evidence.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Italy's Lake Monster
programme.desc: The Lake Garda monster has been described as a huge, humped bear - half snake, half dinosaur. Jeremy travels to northern Italy to investigate and discovers that these picturesque waters could be hiding several enormous beasts.

programme.title: River Monsters: Demon Fish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo in search of the world's most ferocious fish.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Gift of Hunger
programme.desc: After the kids turn their collective noses up at Dre's favourite cheap restaurant in his old 'hood, he decides it's time to give them a reality check. He insists all of them get jobs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Oedipal Triangle
programme.desc: Dre's mother, Ruby, comes for a visit, and she smothers her pork chops with gravy, Dre with love, and would like to flat out smother Bow, who feels the same way about her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Colored Commentary
programme.desc: Dre wants the family to feel more connected so he encourages 'Team Johnson' to embrace what it means to have each other’s backs.

programme.title: Black-ish: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: Dre thinks Rainbow is questioning his machismo after another man dismisses him in front of her, but when Pops swoops in to help his son save face, Ruby is attracted to his show of manliness and the couple reignite their love affair.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Big Night, Big Fight
programme.desc: Although Dre and Rainbow find they always end up quarreling on their annual Valentine's Day date, this time around, Dre is determined to do everything right and keep the peace.

programme.title: Black-ish: Andre From Marseille
programme.desc: When Zoey brings home her first 'serious' boyfriend, a boy from school also named Andre, Dre takes an instant dislike to him for many reasons that include the fact that he's white, from France and rather worldly for a kid.

programme.desc: After a bizarre account of suspected false identity is reported, authorities uncover a long history of an evasive criminal and launch a nationwide hunt to catch a killer who uses Southern charm as a weapon of deception.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Melanie Ray & Chandler Clark
programme.desc: A good samaritan falls victim to a brutal crime, leading police on a manhunt for a pair of killers fueled by envy and rage.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Erin Caffey and Charlie Wilkinson
programme.desc: When a family falls victim to a devastating crime, the search for the killers lays bare a twisted romance and a motive no one can believe.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: When Todd Winkler was arrested for killing his wife Rachel, he claimed self-defense. Investigators learned Rachel wasn't the first Mrs. Winkler to die and traveled cross country to understand what happened on that camping trip a decade earlier.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Secret
programme.desc: Was a man missing or was he hiding; on the surface it didn't make sense: he had a wife, a good job, a daughter he loved. Investigators were told he also had a secret and they went on an undercover mission to find the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Burning Suspicion
programme.desc: At first, the fatal fire that swept through the home of a young couple looked like an accident. Then investigators took a closer look - and what they discovered about the fire, and this couple, left them burning with suspicion.

programme.title: Dateline: What They Saw
programme.desc: A Georgia father accused of murdering his ex-wife speaks. His friends come together to prove he's innocent while prosecutors count on his young children to testify against their own father.

programme.title: Dateline: The Threat
programme.desc: In 1988, a mother of four is murdered in her home. Police suspect her husband but it takes 14 before he's convicted. Another inmate revealed that he's issued a death threat on the prosecutor and when he's granted parole, it's feared he could kill again.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: A prominent attorney claims to have accidentally shot his wife but the local prosecutor questions his story. Was it an act of murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Poison
programme.desc: Larry McNabney had a thriving career and a wife he adored. Then he vanished. It was a mystery as twisted as they come. At its center: three lives tangled together in a love triangle, including one of them who was hiding a secret identity.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Guess Who's Coming to Criticize Dinner?
programme.desc: Homer asks Lisa for help when he becomes the food critic for The Springfield Shopper.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Mother the Carjacker

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: The Torture Escape
programme.desc: No one knows how Harry Houdini pulled off his death-defying escapes, but now, a team of experts investigate his water torture illusion to reveal the secrets of this mysterious feat. What they uncover suggests Houdini might have led a double life as a spy.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: To Catch a Bullet
programme.desc: A team of experts re-create one of the deadliest tricks in magic history to uncover how Houdini could have pulled off the feat that killed many of his peers.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Siberian Prison Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of Houdini's greatest escapes might have been a deep-cover conspiracy to spy for the American government and experts recreate his break from a Siberian prison transport to investigate the mysteries behind this incredible feat.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Houdini's mysterious sudden death might not have been an accident, and experts recreate his buried alive escape to reveal how this deadly feat was performed and if the great magician was killed by forces far more insidious.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: It's A Rainbow
programme.desc: It's a kaleidoscope of color as Alfonso Ribeiro finds out how RW Garcia make their tortilla chips so vibrantly red. Then it's off to Amy's Kitchen for their multicolored, palate-pleasing Thai Red Curry Bowl.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores layer after layer of flavor when he gets the inside scoop on Tootsie's Caramel Apple Pops, Bissinger's Coconut Caramel Chocolate Bar and Tastykake's Cherry Sweet Rolls.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Pop Stars
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro explores some treats with serious pop. He'll pop the top of a Snapple Kiwi Strawberry beverage, pop a bubble with the classic Big League Chew shredded bubblegum, and get the inside scoop at Pez.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sticky Situation
programme.desc: The secrets behind Necco's Slapstix lollipops and Long Grove Confectionary's Toffee.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Horseshoes, Dishwashers, Graphite Fly Rods, and Frozen Pizza
programme.desc: From the garage to the kitchen, find out how everyday items are made including horseshoes, dishwashers, graphite fly rods and frozen pizzas.

programme.title: How It's Made: Space Pens; Reef Aquariums; Metal Caskets; Composite Bike Wheels
programme.desc: Learn how they make space pens, reef aquariums, metal caskets and composite bike wheels.

programme.title: How It's Made: Powder Horns; Handcrafted Molds; Pierogies; Inner Tubes
programme.desc: Mark Tewksbury shows viewers how some familiar objects of everyday life are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Rawhide Lampshades; Chocolate Chip Cookies; MRI Scanners
programme.desc: A look at how rawhide lampshades, chocolate chip cookies and MRI scanners are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Farmed Caviar, Intake Manifolds, Motorcycle Jackets, Shovels & Spades
programme.desc: Learn the secrets behind farmed caviar, intake manifolds, motorcycle jackets, shovels, and spades.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Featured: abalone collagen; digital-to-analog converters; embossed wood mouldings; plier staplers.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Book of James
programme.desc: An affair between a married pastor and a member of his flock takes a shocking turn when he proposes a polygamous relationship with his wife. But an unexpected arrival threatens their pledge of secrecy.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. His infatuation leads to obsession and when their secret affair is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody Texas showdown.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Should Have Killed Him Myself
programme.desc: John Duck spent his entire life fearing the day his brother, Kevin, would finally kill someone. When he discovered his brother was actually a murderer, he still wasn't ready to face the truth he had always known: that his brother had been born a killer.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Body in the SUV
programme.desc: When the badly decomposed body of Margarita Scott is found in the backseat of her estranged husband's missing SUV, investigators must interview everyone close to her to retrace her final steps.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Murder in the Park
programme.desc: 19 year-old single mother, Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die. As police unlock the secrets of her life, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal may have led to her murder.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Body in the SUV
programme.desc: When the badly decomposed body of Margarita Scott is found in the backseat of her estranged husband's missing SUV, investigators must interview everyone close to her to retrace her final steps.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men
programme.desc: After moving to a remote town in Colorado, Ron and Cynthia Phillips and their four children try to adjust. But their never-aired home videos mask darker impulses within their family - ones that would lead to a complex web of deceit, infidelity and murder.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In Love With The Devil
programme.desc: Bernadette was 17 when her boyfriend, Brian Sugrim, told her he had murdered someone. But she didn't believe him. Only years later would she realize the true evil that Brian was capable of. Will a monster get away with murder?

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Married to the Devil
programme.desc: Christine's life with abusive husband Shane is a constant cycle of fear, humiliation and violence. When she finally escapes with her kids, Shane sets off in pursuit, kicking off a series of terrifying and shocking events leading to a bloody conclusion.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cash In
programme.desc: The stakes are high and the chips are down when these Deadly Women decide to 'Cash In.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Predator
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: No Mercy
programme.desc: Some women don't have a kind bone in their body. They take lives without a second thought. A mom sacrifices her son; a greedy book-keeper steals her way to murder and a teen takes her rebellion to shocking heights.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Money Hungry
programme.desc: A California businesswoman targets a Lotto winner and takes more than his cash; a young bride's charm masks her brutal nature and a sea voyage ends with man overboard.

programme.title: Deadly Women: An Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. When these women were crossed, they didn't take it lying down. Murder was their answer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hidden Rage
programme.desc: Some women's feminine wiles mask their true natures. On the surface these women appear fun, but if you cross them they turn lethal. When these Deadly Women felt let down, they took revenge and revealed their "Hidden Rage".

programme.title: Deadly Women: Without Conscience
programme.desc: A look at some women who killed without a conscience.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless Souls
programme.desc: Sometimes evil seems to lurk from the beginning, and there's no stopping it. For these deadly women, cruelty comes from deep within.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mean Teens
programme.desc: A teen wants to date more than she wants her mother; a student makes herself an orphan and a girl sacrifices her grandmother to be with a boy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vicious Vixens
programme.desc: An English beauty spars with her boyfriend, a middle-aged woman sacrifices lives for money, and a couple of game players lure an innocent man into a deadly trap.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Blood for Money
programme.desc: Money is the driving force behind many crimes, especially murder. These women would stop at nothing to get their hands on the cash they needed. From husbands to strangers to other people's babies - they spilt Blood for Money.

programme.title: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Sheriff Baker and the Everglades Blood Feud

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Fearful Flier/ Lend Me Your Paw
programme.desc: Bodhi faces his fear to earn his final stamp towards becoming a Super Flier. After Mia gets a thorn stuck in her paw, she worries it will hurt when K.C. tries to take it out.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Campy Camper Day!/ Founder's Day Flounder!
programme.desc: While on a camping trip, Mickey, Donald and Daisy can't unplug from their electronic devices. Mickey and the gang celebrate the 100th birthday of Hot Dog Hills.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Pinball/ Bounce-a-Tron
programme.desc: The team thwarts Romeo's plan to play a game of pinball in the city with wrecking balls. Catboy wants to prove he is great by stopping Night Ninja on his own.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Finders Keepers/ Monster Next Door
programme.desc: Rizzo discovers emeralds in the sandbox and has to decide whether to keep them or not; the Muppet Babies must rescue Potato after he accidentally ends up with a monster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Lights Camera Uh-Oh/ Wax Dave
programme.desc: The Chipmunks have 48 hours to help Jeanette make a student film. But every chipmunk has a very different movie in mind. The Chipmunks follow Dave and find out he's fallen in love with a dangerous woman who wants to turn him into a wax statue.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: We're The Chipmunks/ Save the Dance
programme.desc: When a new boy band, 'The Hipmunks,' tries to steal the spotlight, the Chipmunks are forced to compete in a battle of the bands.The Principal gives Alvin and Derek an ultimatum. If they fight, the school dance will be canceled.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Miss Dimmsdale/ Mind Over Magic
programme.desc: Vicky will stop at nothing to win the Miss Dimmsdale Pageant; Timmy can read minds.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Masked Magician/ The Big Bash
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Magician powers to perform at the fair; Cupid has a party at his house.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Operation Fun/ Smart Attack
programme.desc: Remy Buxaplenty has come home from military school for spring break. All he can talk about is how great his new school is, making Timmy and friends jealous; Dad keeps trying to help Timmy with his homework, but he's not the brightest dad.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fairly Oddlympics
programme.desc: Timmy and friends compete in an Olympics of their own to see who is most magical.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: It's Pony: Clara Time/ Dog Day
programme.desc: Annie worries that their friend Clara is avoiding her and Pony. When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mall Girl Pearl/ Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that's hiring is the lamest store at the mall. SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob LongPants/ Larry's Gym
programme.desc: SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, but they change his life in unexpected ways.When Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob, You're Fired!
programme.desc: In order to save money, Mr. Krabs fires SpongeBob; however, unable to just "do nothing", SpongeBob decides to go back to work, no matter what - or where.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Friendly Game/ Sentimental Sponge
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build an indoor miniature golf course in SpongeBob's house. SpongeBob has trouble throwing anything away when he realizes how many memories are attached to all his possessions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Abrasive Side / Earworm
programme.desc: SpongeBob can never say 'no'; SpongeBob has a song stuck in his head.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary
programme.desc: Squidward cleans up the city of Bikini Bottom with 'help' from SpongeBob. SpongeBob brings Gary a pet that terrorizes him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hooky
programme.desc: When the mysterious 'hooks' suddenly appear, Mr. Krabs warns SpongeBob to stay away from them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Tentacle-vision/ I Heart Dancing
programme.desc: Squidward gets a TV show. / SpongeBob has a dance audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Secret Box/ Band Geeks
programme.desc: Pat won't show SpongeBob his secret box; Squid recruits a band to one-up a rival.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pizza Delivery/ Home Sweet Pineapple
programme.desc: Bob and Squid deliver Krabby Patty pizza; Bob loses his pineapple house to parasites.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanctuary! / What's Eating Patrick?
programme.desc: When stray snails start appearing around Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob decides to care for them himself. To defend Bikini Bottom's honor, Patrick enters a Krabby Patty eating competition.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!
