programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Impatient Patient
programme.desc: Even though he is clearly sick, Hiro refuses to listen to Baymax or his teammates and insists that he should not stay on the sidelines during a battle with the Mad Jacks.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fan Friction
programme.desc: When Karmi starts posting fan fiction about Big Hero 6, depicting Hiro as her boyfriend, Hiro is embarrassed and wants her to stop.

programme.title: DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Infernal Internship of Mark Beaks
programme.desc: Huey competes with Dewey for a coveted internship with Duckburg's newest tech billionaire Mark Beaks, while Scrooge and Glomgold team up to take this annoying new competitor down.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Spear of Selene!
programme.desc: Donald is dragged into a feud between Scrooge and Zeus, while Dewey and Webby search for an artifact that may provide the truth about Dewey's mother.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred's Bro-Tillion
programme.desc: When supervillain Baron Von Steamer crashes Fred's Bro-Tillion, the Big Hero 6 team springs into action.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Issue 188
programme.desc: As Hiro tries to find a way to connect to classmate Karmi, Go Go and Fred dive deep into comic book mythology to defeat High Voltage, a mother-daughter supervillain duo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kentucky Kaiju
programme.desc: Hiro decides to upgrade himself with a superpower of his own: super strength. Unfortunately, his new tech backfires.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Rivalry Weak
programme.desc: Honey Lemon secretly takes art classes at SFIT’s rival, SFAI, and soon finds herself caught in the middle of both schools’ annual Rivalry Week.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Max
programme.desc: Hiro invents a tiny robot, Mini-Max, to supervise and be a sidekick to Fred while the rest of the team is in class.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Steamer's Revenge
programme.desc: To try to prove Yama is behind a mysterious crime spree, perpetrated by tiny bots, Hiro is drawn back into the illegal world of bot-fighting.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero 7
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Prey Date
programme.desc: Hiro and Fred enlist Karmi to find out what Liv Amara is doing to cure Orso Knox, the man who was mysteriously turned into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Fred the Fugitive
programme.desc: Fred's invisibility function on his suit glitches during patrol.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Major Blast

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Here I Come, Pants!

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: For Whom the Booty Calls

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Beer-Battered Rip-Off

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Boompa Loved His Hookers

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Don't Give a Monkey a Gun

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Of Course He's Dead

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: Frasier: Three Blind Dates

programme.title: Frasier: Deathtrap
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles revisit their childhood home and discover a skull in their secret place.

programme.title: Frasier: The Love You Fake

programme.title: Frasier: Cheerful Goodbyes

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Has Spokane

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life

programme.title: Movie: Amazing Winter Romance
programme.desc: A journalist heads to her home town to find some inspiration for new stories. There, she discovers her childhood friend has built a giant snow maze, which leads to her to her one true love.

programme.title: Movie: Autumn Dreams
programme.desc: A young couple's spur of the moment marriage is immediately annulled by the bride's parents. Years later, they discover that a glitch in the paperwork means they are still husband and wife.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love

programme.title: Movie: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: A woman makes a risky move and opens her own restaurant, igniting her passion for cooking. Upon her arrival, she meets a former baseball player, with a competitive streak, who has opened his own new restaurant and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Sunshine

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Joins NAMBLA
programme.desc: Cartman suddenly finds Stan, Kenny and Kyle too immature to be his friends. He then decides to seek friendship using the Internet, where he finds an older man who is more than willing to be his 'friend.'

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park: Human Cent-iPad
programme.desc: Kyle is intimately involved in the development of a revolutionary new product that is about to be launched by Apple. Meanwhile, Cartman doesn't even have a regular iPad yet, a problem he blames his mother for.

programme.title: South Park: Put It Down
programme.desc: North Korea aims for South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Wieners Out
programme.desc: The boys band together to stand up for their rights.

programme.title: Jim Gaffigan: Noble Ape

programme.title: South Park: ManBearPig
programme.desc: The boys are trapped in a cave and Cartman finds a treasure. Meanwhile, Al Gore shows up in town to warn the citizens about the threat of ManBearPig.

programme.title: South Park: The Losing Edge
programme.desc: The kids desperately want to bring an end to the boring baseball season. The problem is, they keep winning.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: Coon 2: Hindsight

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion Rises

programme.title: South Park: Coon vs. Coon and Friends

programme.title: South Park: The Coon

programme.title: South Park: Wing
programme.desc: The boys set up the 'Awesome Talent Agency' and pool all their resources to impress their first client only to have an agency run by the Chinese Mafia steal her away.

programme.title: South Park: Miss Teacher Bangs a Boy

programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed in front of his friends when his father gets pulled over for driving under the influence of alcohol. Meanwhile, a bleeding statue of Mary is discovered and the faithful are flocking to the site, hoping for miraculous healings.

programme.title: South Park: With Apologies to Jesse Jackson
programme.desc: Randy Marsh tries to find forgiveness after mistakenly using a racial slur on 'Wheel of Fortune.' Meanwhile, Cartman gets into a rumble with an assembly guest.

programme.title: South Park: Ginger Kids
programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Belles of the Balls
programme.desc: Carrie helps Aidan and Big learn to accept each other, while Miranda and Steve get closer.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Coulda, Woulda, Shoulda
programme.desc: Miranda reveals that she's pregnant, and after much deliberation, she decides to have the baby. Meanwhile, Samantha uses her connection as a representative for Lucy Liu to her advantage so she can nab a great handbag.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Just Say Yes
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous when Aidan suggests that they move in together. To make matters worse, she finds an engagement ring among his things and questions whether he is 'the one.' Miranda and Steve decide to raise the baby together, while living separately.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Movie: Sex and the City
programme.desc: A couple's plan to have a small wedding gets blown way out of proportion when the bride is asked to model wedding dresses for Vogue magazine. The groom's cold feet result in the bridal party going off to Mexico without him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wonder Women
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's visiting an all-female lineup that's rockin' the house. In Houston, a grandma's firing up family recipes like homemade tamales and chile rellenos with a twist. In Orlando, Florida, a funky spot is focused on making meatball masterpieces.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Aces of Authenticity
programme.desc: Guy hits up some joints that are authentic to the bone. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-raised Chimayan owner turns out traditional dishes like blue corn enchiladas with red chilli sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: One of a Kind
programme.desc: Guy visits Massachusetts where people line up for whole-belly clams, and Michigan for chicken gizzards.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cruisin' Capital Cities
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Servin' Up San Francisco
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's cruising the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. First, Guy swings by the repurposed garage in the Mission District for some southern hospitality.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Eating Alaska
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son, Hunter, are taking a culinary journey up to Juneau, Alaska. They're divin' into everything from a family-run, wood-fired pizza wagon making reindeer pie to a funky basement spot mashin' up Latin-Asian fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Authentic Eats
programme.desc: Guy finds real deal authentic eats in St. Louis and Syracuse.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Big Time Bites
programme.desc: Guy's rolling up to some joints pulling out all the stops. In New York's East Village, the neighbourhood spot plating up a standout burger is worthy of a four star review.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Things New York
programme.desc: Guy's gets a taste of New York in and out of the Big Apple, including Eureka, California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Tailgatin'
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits a Raiders home game for tailgating with chefs from three local joints. They're bringing the kitchen to the blacktop and cranking out chicken and waffles, double chili cheeseburgers and steak sandwiches with jalapeno pesto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Flavortown Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri revisits some of the best of Flavortown, starting in San Diego, where an Asian-inspired noodle house is takin' over the neighborhood. In New Orleans, a neighborhood bistro bounces back from Hurricane Katrina.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Pork to Pot Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri starts things off internationally as he brings the whole family to his favourite jerk joint in Ocho Rios, Jamaica. Then it's back to the States, where a cafeteria in Tucker, Ga. hasn't changed a thing - including its true Southern staples.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Chili Three Ways
programme.desc: Guy Fieri crosses the border to Vancouver, British Columbia, to check in on an authentic Chinese place and see if their thousand chili chicken is as spicy as it sounds.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Barbecue Chicken Pan Pizza
programme.desc: Rachael's barbecue chicken pan pizza is the perfect mix of salty, sweet, tangy and sharp. She bakes the dough in cast iron until it's crispy and tops it with barbecue chicken, mozzarella and cheddar cheese with a finishing of honey and cilantro.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Chicken Cacciatore for the Soul
programme.desc: Colton Underwood is an ex-football player who now runs a non-profit to benefit people living with cystic fibrosis.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Perfect Plate of Summer
programme.desc: Summer foods are in the spotlight as The Kitchen creates a perfect plate of summer favourites. Sunny makes her London Broil with Tomato and Fennel, and Katie serves up Bacon and Ranch Potato Salad. The gang shares three new toppings for grilled corn.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Picnic at the Vineyard
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is wining and dining her friends who are visiting from Las Vegas. They're headed to Arrington Vineyards, co-owned by Trisha's friend, country singer Kix Brooks, and Trisha makes a picnic with roasted beet and dill dip and pasta salad.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Girl's Brunch
programme.desc: Molly treats her girlfriends to her favourite brunch dishes after a night out in Grand Forks. There's mini quiches with peas and bacon, garlicky lemony kale and a dark chocolate scone loaf with marzipan for a sweet treat.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 3
programme.desc: Ree puts a spin on two family favourites in her quick and easy spinach artichoke chicken, she makes a crisp parmesan salad bowl, and her shortcut pretzel dogs are officially Ladd-approved. She finishes off on a sweet note with 'fried' ice cream.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Graduation Party
programme.desc: Ree and her friend are throwing a graduation party for their daughters and it's going to be a blast. There's a steak and shrimp taco bar with great sides and toppings, including Tex-Mex black beans, queso blanco, and peach salsa.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Italian Feast
programme.desc: The Kitchen is cooking up an Italian feast, and Jeff Mauro gets the meal going with his Italian stuffed artichokes. Sunny makes her easy tomato and basil lasagna roll-ups. Chef Christian Petroni shares how to get the wood-fired pizza taste at home.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Slumber Party
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood celebrates her friend Glenda's birthday with a slumber party in comfy clothes, and delicious treats are on the menu.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: French to Make at Home
programme.desc: Ina has all the tricks for cooking French at home with secrets to a show.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheesy Special
programme.desc: Four chefs compete in the cheesiest showdown in Triple G history.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Five-Star Showdown
programme.desc: Guy Fieri transforms Flavortown into a high-end restaurant and invites four chefs for three rounds of five-star cooking. First, he challenges them to elevate the ingredients in a frozen TV dinner, then to prepare signature dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: GGG Winners vs. Judges
programme.desc: Three GGG winners team up to take on a trio of Flavortown's finest judges to see who comes out on top of Guy's devious games.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: If at First You Don't Succeed, Fry, Fry Again
programme.desc: The chefs must make a skewered meal out of items found in the clearance carts.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Butterfly/ The Question

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Oracle/ The Safety

programme.title: Roseanne: The Commercial Show

programme.title: Roseanne: Therapy

programme.title: Roseanne: Aliens
programme.desc: Becky is distraught when Roseanne and Dan inform her that their economic woes have put her college plans on hold.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan try to keep laughing so they won't start crying as their motorcycle shop goes out of business. Meanwhile, Becky's boyfriend Mark is offered a fabulous job in another state, so they decide to elope.

programme.title: Roseanne: Terms of Estrangement

programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dolphin Doctor
programme.desc: Polka, a bottlenose dolphin, has a raspy voice and needs to see the doctor to get the all-clear. Staff excitedly prepare for the upcoming puffin breeding season. Two woebegone sharks are due for a checkup. A curious and active box turtle goes for a walk.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris unearths a whirlwind wedding ceremony, some exploding rocks and a woman's twin inside her brain.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Host Chris Packham reveals how deadly poisonous frogs can saves lives, why we see faces in everything and how one woman's pants spontaneously burst into flame.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the mysteries behind a glacier that bleeds red, finds out how an electrician got tattooed by a lightning bolt and uncovers the remarkable story of a man with a tooth for an eye.

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Chris discovers the secrets behind a flame-filled firenado, unearths a very bizarre looking living rock and meets a team of oversized rats who save lives.

programme.title: Planet Earth: The Best of The Hunt
programme.desc: A detailed look at the remarkable strategies the planet's top hunters use to succeed, and the huge effort they must put forth in order to survive.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Enchanted Kingdom
programme.desc: Narrated by Idris Elba, explore seven distinct worlds in the wildest continent on Earth, Africa, to discover that nature is so much more surprising and extraordinary than ever imagined.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: A convicted murderer awaits his sentence, another inmate turns up with a pair of black eyes, and we take you to the one place in the entire jail where drama is seldom in short supply, 'Mod Q' which houses a variety of protective custody inmates.

programme.title: Lockup: Boston Extended Stay: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: With deep-rooted loyalties running through its communities, Boston is known as 'the city of neighbourhoods'. When certain Bostonians take territorial pride a little too far, they could wind up in the Suffolk County Jail.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita Extended Stay: Defending Bacon
programme.desc: At Wichita's Sedgwick County Jail an inmate launches an attack on another, sending him to the emergency room. Now a detective must get to the bottom of it, while a pastor hopes to get to the heart of it.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Unholy Trinity
programme.desc: Every year, close to 70,000 people are processed through the five facilities that make up the Orange County Jail. Some will call the jail home until their cases are resolved in court a process that can take years.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Murder and Miracles
programme.desc: One inmate launches a near fatal attack after being in jail for less than an hour. A father accused of murdering his daughter admits to keeping her corpse with him for two years.

programme.title: Lockup: Tulsa Extended Stay: Shackled Love
programme.desc: One inmate's troubled past leads to angry outbursts inside the jail, while another arrives after an alleged crime spree that sounds like it's right out of a movie. And a young mother could go to prison if she's found guilty of robber.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: The Confession
programme.desc: A senior inmate takes up rap; a gang member poses a threat, and another inmate makes the most shocking confession ever heard on 'Lockup.'

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Unholy Trinity

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: Starz and Zillas
programme.desc: One alleged gang leader is charged with assault shortly after his arrest. And now his arch-rival is has been booked into the jail as well.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: The Force LaForce
programme.desc: Go inside prisons and jails across America and around the world.

programme.title: Lockup: Sacramento Extended Stay: Taming Wild
programme.desc: A recent law brings a wave of prison felons to the county jail, creating difficult challenges and potential threats. A family man gets a decade in jail for manufacturing weapons, and a meth addict gives up a prized possession.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Occult Conspiracy
programme.desc: As the Nazis waged war for world domination, they began to develop a strange mythology of occult rites and pagan beliefs, and now, experts investigate how far the Nazis may have gone to transform their party into a new, cult-like religion.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Pyramid Code
programme.desc: Ancient pyramids are among the greatest wonders of the world and exist across many civilizations. Explore the origins of these structures as experts question if they were independently constructed or perhaps the design of something more mysterious.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Curse of the Crystal Skulls
programme.desc: Mysterious crystal skulls could be long-lost relics of Aztec and Maya civilizations that grant supernatural powers, according to some; experts investigate new leads to reveal if these strange objects are genuine artifacts or if they're modern-day fakes.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Raiders of the Holy Grail
programme.desc: As the Nazi war machine tore through Europe, they plundered museums in search of holy relics that would grant them untold power and prestige. experts investigate how close Hitler was to discovering the Holy Grail and its promise of eternal life.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Search for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Mysterious evidence on Mt. Ararat could be the long-lost remains of Noah's Ark, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate if these discoveries are hard proof of the Biblical legend.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Sins of Ghost Vegas
programme.desc: An abandoned Vegas-style getaway with a deadly secret, a ghost town sinking into the earth, and a passenger train on a course for disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare on Main Street
programme.desc: A railroad bridge on the edge of disaster, a nightmare in a fairy-tale town, and a massive cathedral in calamity are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigating a skyscraper raining deadly bolts on the streets below, a highway on the brink of collapse, and a catastrophic landslide.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Death Watch
programme.desc: These Deadly Women get their kicks from the suffering of others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Boiling Point
programme.desc: A beautiful face can mask the ugliest of intentions.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Unholy Matrimony
programme.desc: When a woman joins a church in Florida looking for spiritual guidance, she is offered it by the church's enigmatic married pastor. Their friendship quickly develops into something more.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Who Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Michelle Donohue wants a loving and well-off family of her own. She burns through good men, valuing wealth more than love. But when she finally meets Mr. Right she gets a taste of her own medicine, sending her down a path of murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Til' Death Do We Part
programme.desc: Lyle and Carol Kopenskey are high school sweethearts who marry after graduation. The couple that other couples want to be like. But after 40 years of marital bliss, an old friend returns to the fold and jealousies turn passions into cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Unholy Matrimony
programme.desc: When a woman joins a church in Florida looking for spiritual guidance, she is offered it by the church's enigmatic married pastor. Their friendship quickly develops into something more.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: Portrait of a Stalker
programme.desc: In 2007, 17-year old Katie is living in Tennessee with her doting parents. But Katie's been keeping secrets, and her parents are shocked to discover she's being stalked by an ex-boyfriend they didn't know existed.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Gone
programme.desc: Claiming to be desperate to find the missing mother of his child, a Texas man talks with Dr. Phil, but within hours he tells police a much different story.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Devil's Island
programme.desc: An ex-marine with a secret life has a girlfriend who goes missing in Panama.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Who Killed Fabio?
programme.desc: Fabio Sementilli was a beloved hairstylist and beauty executive who was murdered while relaxing near his pool. Michelle Miller investigates his murder and the hunt for his killers.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Sender: Unknown
programme.desc: 12-year-old Justin Bloxom is addicted to MySpace and attached to his cell phone. One night, Justin sneaks out of a friend's house to meet a new friend, but never returns. The investigation unravels a tangled web of fake identities and false promises.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Age, Sex, Location
programme.desc: 13 year-old Kacie Woody meets two male friends via the internet – Scott, from Atlanta; and Dave, a surfing enthusiast from California. But one of these boys is not what he seems, as Kacie's innocent online contacts turn to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Mr. Fix It
programme.desc: City-girl Leslie Belkin moves south and meets a man on Craigslist. At first George seems perfect - he's nice and helpful around the yard. But once she discovers his criminal record, she realizes she isn't the only casual encounter George has made online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lost Rider
programme.desc: Autumn Pasquale, 12, loves her new BMX and networks with fellow fans online for tips and tricks to deck it out. But on Homecoming Day 2012, Autumn - and her beloved new bike - go missing. A trail is left behind on Facebook, but where will it lead?

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crime Scene Selfie
programme.desc: 23-year-old Amanda Taylor shares her entire life on the internet. Following a terrible tragedy, her posts begin take a dark turn.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Dangerous Houses
programme.desc: 18-year-old Brookelyn Farthing disappears in 2013 after attending a party in the small town of Berea, Kentucky. And then, 24-year-old Lindsay Buziak, a young beautiful realtor, is found brutally killed after showing some new clients a million-dollar home.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Down the Hill
programme.desc: 13-year-old Abby Williams and 14-year-old Libby German go for a short walk on a popular hiking trail and then disappear. And then 13-year-old Dylan Redwine vanishes on Thanksgiving break, 2012, while visiting his dad in Vallecito, Colorado.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as Katrina Refugees
programme.desc: After killing his mother, Scott Webb and his wife go on the run. They head to Texas and fool a small-town church into taking pity on them. But when their story hits the local news, church members call police, who track the couple down in Seattle.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be a Car Salesman
programme.desc: An ex-con rebuilds his reputation as a successful car salesman until a freak accident threatens to send him back to jail.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Be Part of the Pittsburgh Six
programme.desc: Andrew Heim is doing time for assault at Western Penitentiary in Pennsylvania. When a prison buddy finds a way to tunnel out of the prison Heim and five other inmates escape. The group is dubbed 'The Pittsburgh Six' and sparks a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in a Love Triangle
programme.desc: Henry Lee Marshall is obsessed with Martha Leathers, and in a fit of jealousy, kills her husband and flees. Unable to stay away for long, Marshall returns to harass her. Finally, after nine years of stalking Martha, his time on the run comes to an end.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Taunt the Cops
programme.desc: Jimmy Maxwell is no stranger to prison life. But every time he gets arrested, he outsmarts officials and escapes. His go-for-broke nature makes him a menace for authorities, who come face to face with his volatile nature each time they corner him.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Operation Celestial Balance
programme.desc: In 1998 the bombers of the US Embassy in Nairobi started a trail of destruction that the CIA had to stop. It's Al Qaeda's first attack. The trail leads to Somalia and Mogadishu. The CIA bribes warlords and use drones to track and kill an untried man.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: Killing the Bombers
programme.desc: The bombers of the USS Cole in the Yemen port of Aden are found but the leadership remains elusive. After 9/11, Al Qaeda escalate their attacks and the godfather of terror is revealed. His use of a satphone locates him and he's killed by a drone.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Pink Shack
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Tough Times in Topsail
programme.desc: A beach-loving couple looks for a forever home in Topsail, North Carolina, and finds a property with potential that needs major renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Bring It on in Brigantine, NJ
programme.desc: After spending many summer days vacationing on the Jersey Shore, a couple is ready to buy a getaway of their own in Brigantine, NJ.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: With an upcoming move fast approaching, a couple with three boys needs to put their home on the market as soon as possible. Their sloped yard and aging features aren't helping, so Chris and Sara stretch their bucket to get the value up.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Den
programme.desc: Beau Dunavant bought a piece of land in Tres Piedras, New Mexico, as a gift for his girlfriend, Samantha Inman, where they can build a home made of mostly recycled materials and lots of dirt.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future
programme.desc: Two animal lovers with a heart for rescuing dogs and cats call on Chase Morrill and his team to transform their West Gardiner cabin into a pet sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Clearwater Camp
programme.desc: The team take on a cabin in Industry, ME, that hasn't been touched since the 1970's. Loads of issues arise once the snow melts and they start digging in.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tony Awards
programme.desc: Past contestants return for a shot to serve the VIP at the 65th Tony Awards.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Wedding Planner
programme.desc: Four talented cupcake bakers compete for a chance to have their delicious creations featured with some of the wedding's most influential tastemakers.

programme.title: Wedding Cake Championship: Puppet Love
programme.desc: Six of America's best baking duos begin their quest for wedding cake domination and the $25,000 prize as hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir hit them with their first challenge: creating a cake topper that showcases a city of love.

programme.title: Wedding Cake Championship: Live to Dance
programme.desc: Hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir challenge the five baking teams to make a cake topper that's an ode to music. Then the teams meet their clients, Ashley and Phil, who got engaged while dancing.

programme.title: Wedding Cake Championship: A Tale of Two Stephanies
programme.desc: The first challenge for the four remaining teams is to create cake toppers that pay homage to online dating. Then hosts Tara Lipinski and Johnny Weir introduce the bakers to their clients, Stephanie and Stephanie.

programme.title: Wedding Cake Championship: Ashley I. and Jared
programme.desc: In the grand finale, the last three teams of bakers start by making lifelike flower cake toppers. For their final cake challenge, the teams must bake epic cakes that exude New England glam for Ashley I. and Jared.

programme.title: Challenge: Monopoly Cakes
programme.desc: Game on! "Challenge" celebrates the 85th anniversary of one of the world's most-popular board games, Monopoly. Ian Ziering challenges four skilled cake artists to create iconic anniversary cakes that have it all, from treasured game pieces to Park Place.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Family Recipes
programme.desc: Some secret family recipes are just meant to be shared, like the secret behind Graeter's rich and creamy ice cream. Get the lowdown on how Mrs. T's Pierogies turned a classic Polish dish into the American dream.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Secret Center
programme.desc: Join host Alfonso Ribeiro as he explores foods with secret centers. From the gooey middle of the Mallo Cup to the creamy goodness of a peppermint cream or the surprisingly complex filling in a Mini Beef Wellington.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Rise and Dine with Unwrapped 2.0 and find out how the light and airy French donut gets its fancy twist, as well as how sprouted wheat turns into a hearty, tasty cinnamon raisin bagel.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Game Day Munchies
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro serves up a fantasy league of snacks. Clear off the coffee table for Home Run Inn's Meat Lovers Pizza and the cheese and caramel popcorn mix from Garrett's in Chicago.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Comfort
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America. He's in the kitchen revealing comfort-loving chefs' soul-warming secrets.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Spicy
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 12 of the best spicy foods in restaurants across the country. He's in the kitchen with spice-loving chefs preparing the hottest recipes in America and revealing their tongue-scorching secrets.

programme.title: Varsity Barbecue
programme.desc: In Texas, BBQ is more than just meat…it’s the new Friday night lights! The pressure is on as high school BBQ teams all over the state compete in the categories of brisket, ribs, chicken, and dessert to win $50,000.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Cali Cookout
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets San Francisco-based chef Thomas McNaughton at a farm in Healdsburg, Calif., for a live-fire feast of epic proportions. They affix a whole pig to a metal cross to cook over hot coals for several hours.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Rad Rigs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is on the hunt for the most radical barbecue rigs, and he starts at The Pit Room in Houston, Texas, where special events call for a custom-built trailer that can cook up to 600 pounds of meat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Barbecue and Barbacoa
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to tge Lone Star State to meet a family that specializes in Texas barbeque and Mexican barbacoa.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ in Big Cities
programme.desc: Roger knows it's not just small towns that dish out big flavours. He heads to Bludso's Bar and Que in L.A., where the owner brings meat and hear to Tinseltown in a big way.

programme.title: Good Eats: Another Man Food Show: Breakfast
programme.desc: Alton helps an average Joe whip up a classic breakfast of bacon, eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wake Up Little Sushi
programme.desc: Alton investigates the ins and outs of Japan's most popular sushi.

programme.title: Good Eats: Wild Yeast Risin'
programme.desc: First the pandemic, then the zombies, then the nukes and now: desolation and a giant dinosaur-thing. Luckily there is still yeast in the air, and Alton proves that with a wild sourdough in the kitchen along with cheese crackers and waffles.

programme.title: Good Eats: Cobbled Together
programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown prepares a special dessert, cobbler.

programme.desc: SpongeBob wins the big prize from his favourite TV show, 'The Adventures of Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy' - The Conch Signal! Now he can summon the semi-retired super heroes whenever there's an emergency.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sold!/ Lame and Fortune
programme.desc: When SpongeBob and Patrick think their homes have been sold, they move away. When fortune cookies start predicting the future, Plankton realizes he can twist them to his own evil schemes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: Bob and Pat's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy III/ Squirrel Jokes
programme.desc: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy go away for the weekend; Bob becomes a stand-up comic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Hall Monitor/ Jellyfish Jam
programme.desc: SpongeBob is the hall monitor at boating school; Bob takes a jellyfish home.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Pig and the Rhino
programme.desc: Donnie finishes a new batch of retro-mutagen, hoping to save Karai, but the Turtles find themselves hunted by Shredder's new vengeful henchmen Bebop and Rocksteady.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Battle for New York
programme.desc: The Turtles brave the bizarre world of Dimension X to try and save the people of New York.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Cubs and Robbers/ Billy the Bug
programme.desc: A movie promotion stunt goes wrong, unleashing a humongous ‘Cubby the Cop’ balloon on the city. Then, Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: Sky Police/ Father's Day Parade
programme.desc: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police. Police captain, Tom Bennett, gets a call that his wife has gone into labor early.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: He Said She Said/ Attack of the Zombies
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany give wildly differing versions of why the fire alarm went off at the school. Convinced a zombie invasion is imminent, Alvin and Theodore attempt to protect their loved ones.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Brittany the Body Snatcher/ Agent Smith
programme.desc: When Alvin notices Brittany being nice to him he's sure an alien has taken over her body. In order to earn a job on the school newspaper, Alvin helps Simon uncover the biggest story the school's ever seen.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: It's My Party/ Keeping Up with the Humphries
programme.desc: Alvin decides to host the coolest paintball party ever at his house for Kevin's birthday. Then, when the Chipmunks try to keep up with the neighbourhood bully's powerful computer game, they end up causing a gigantic disaster.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: iHear/ Switch Witch
programme.desc: Alvin gets a device that lets him listen in on everyone's conversations. When the kids' Halloween candy disappears, they're sure the culprit is 'Switch Witch.'

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Danger Begins
programme.desc: 13-year-old Henry Hart lands a part time job as Kid Danger, the sidekick-in-training to superhero Captain Man. After promising to keep his new identity a secret, Henry must navigate a double life.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Mo' Danger, Mo' Problems
programme.desc: As Henry tries to adjust to his new role as Kid Danger, he struggles to balance his schedule between crime fighting, school, family and friends.

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Secret Gets Out
programme.desc: Henry's life as Kid Danger is threatened when Charlotte gets increasingly suspicious about the secrets he's been hiding.

programme.title: The Thundermans: I'm Gonna Forget You, Sucka
programme.desc: After Cherry accidently posts a photo revealing the Thundermans' secret, the Hero League forces Phoebe to do the unthinkable and end the relationship with her best friend.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Dog Day After-School
programme.desc: Desperate to get their mom's tablet back after it is confiscated at school, Billy and Nora get help from Phoebe, who wants to prove she can be as sneaky as Max.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Aunt Misbehavin'
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe give their mom the ultimate birthday surprise by tracking down her long lost sister, but the gift goes awry when they discover these sisters have been feuding for years.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Back to School
programme.desc: After going back to their elementary school to complete a hero assessment exam, Phoebe and Max realize passing a fifth grade test won't be easy when the instructor is a former classmate that Max tormented when they were younger.

programme.title: It's Pony: Bad Chicken/ Delivery Pony
programme.desc: Annie and Pony's plan to teach a scrawny chicken confidence backfires when it terrorizes the city. A new fruit and vegetable delivery service is threatened by a big corporation.

programme.title: It's Pony: Ten Minute Ticket/ Clara Time
programme.desc: Annie worries that their friend Clara is avoiding her and Pony.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Jack Attack
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Parker's Gotta Go
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cane Crazy / Flood, Sweat & Tears
programme.desc: When Anne breaks Hop Pop's favorite cane, she and her friends set out to replace it; After Anne's bedroom floods she has to share a room with Sprig.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand
programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Grubhog Day/ Hop Pop and Lock
programme.desc: During Grubhog Day, Sprig has to decide whether to uphold his responsibilities or have fun at the carnival. To impress Sylvia Sundew, Hop Pop asks Anne to teach him to dance.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Amphibia: Snow Day/ Cracking Mrs. Croaker
programme.desc: When a winter cold snap freezes all the frogs in Wartwood, Anne must protect the townspeople. In an effort to make Mrs. Croaker like him, Sprig digs up a secret from her past.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Lost in Danville/ The Inator Method
programme.desc: Doof leads a Syd Field style seminar for inventors, Candace tries to bust the boys by multi-tasking and the boys create their own solar system.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Cheers for Fears /Just Our Luck
programme.desc: When Candace is stumped about what to get Jeremy for his birthday, she reluctantly decides to ask Phineas and Ferb for their help in creating a ride of Jeremy’s life.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hiya Henry/ People Watching
programme.desc: Tilly tries ventriloquism for the Big Coffee open mic, but her dummy terrifies Cricket. The family plays the people watching game, making up stories about city folk passing by.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Birmingham
programme.desc: Greek natives and their kin built the Birmingham restaurant scene, from barbecue joints to hotdog stands to steakhouses. Bright Star, founded in 1907, is the old guard and Johnny's is the new guard Greek restaurant. This is what the future looks like.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Athens
programme.desc: Pablo Rivadeneyra rotisserie-cooks lime-marinated chicken in Norwood. Across the street at Scott's BBQ, Larry and Betty Jean Scott work a smoke-belching pit. In these two places, we get a glimpse of the hard work that defines life in the south.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Nashville
programme.desc: One meat and three vegetables is the formula for a typical farmhand meal, translated in the mid-twentieth century to steam table cafes. In Nashville, the differences between Black and White cooking come into focus, and we discover that there are few.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Shreveport
programme.desc: Shreveport emerged in the mid-1800s as a lumber boomtown on the Red River. Cycles of boom and bust has defined this town. Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wok-fried T-bones and pork egg foo young.
