programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The friends share stories about their Thanksgiving dinners throughout the years.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Sex and Death
programme.desc: Molly has a 'mind blowing' experience when she goes to Victoria’s workplace, a funeral home, to research her novel. Meanwhile, Mike sneaks a peek at Molly’s writing when she’s out.

programme.title: Mom: Belgian Waffles and Bathroom Privileges
programme.desc: Christy has trouble accepting how much easier life is with Bonnie in the house. Meanwhile, Baxter sets up camp in the driveway.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Hookers and a Philly Cheesesteak
programme.desc: While Charlie and Rose carry on their 'affair,' Alan's chiropractic business turns into a Ponzi scheme.

programme.title: Black-ish: White Breakfast
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane get in trouble at school, Dre and Bow have to figure out the right balance of discipline and support so that their kids aren't too afraid of authority nor feel entitled.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: The Blind Magician Floating Off a Barstool
programme.desc: Magicians featured in this episode include Titou, Juliana Fay, Leon Etienne, Joshua Jay, Richard Turner and Ed Alonzo.

programme.title: Masters of Illusion: Alex, I'll Take Pickpockets and Monkeys for $1000
programme.desc: Featured magicians include: Michael Turco, Leon Etienne, The Sacred Riana, Chipper Lowell and Jay Jay.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Jonathan Magnum 5
programme.desc: Cast members Ryan Stiles, Wayne Brady and Colin Mochrie, along with guest comedian Jonathan Mangum, put their comedic skills to the test through a series of spontaneous improv games.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?: Chris Hardwick
programme.desc: Guest comedian Chris Hardwick, puts their comedic skills to the test through a series of spontaneous improv games that are prompted only by random ideas supplied by the studio audience.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Other Sister
programme.desc: On the eve of Thanksgiving, Rachel has a bone to pick with her other self-centered sister.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stock Tip
programme.desc: Kramer warns Jerry against investing in the stock market when he gets a hot tip from George.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Cops on the Rocks
programme.desc: Mike and Carl go to couples counselling to try and reconcile their partnership. Also, Molly decides to do a promotional radio interview on her own after Peggy decides not to participate.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: DannyDonnieJoeJonJordan
programme.desc: When falling boxes trap Murray in the garage, he demands that Beverly get rid of everything except for one trunk. When the trunk goes missing, Murray becomes sentimental about what was inside while Erica has trouble parting with her stuff.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Magic Is Real
programme.desc: Inspired by David Copperfield's walk through The Great Wall of China, Adam becomes a magician in order to impress a girl at school. Meanwhile, Barry has no interest in taking the PSAT until he discovers everyone else plans to do so.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Girlfriend Experience
programme.desc: After Han emails photos of a stripper to his mother claiming he has a girlfriend, he asks Max and Caroline to find her and convince her to play his girlfriend while his mother visits from Korea.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Pow Pow Pow!!!
programme.desc: Tasha panics when Pookie accidentally shoots Rick Fox. Chardonnay and Rick bond when she drives him to the hospital. At the urging of Blue, Malik leads the Sabers to a comeback win which sends them to the playoffs.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Mike's Pole
programme.desc: When Mike hangs his prized U.S. flag in the yard, 14-year-old Eve is inspired by her father's patriotism and announces she wants to join the Junior ROTC.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: The Great Migration
programme.desc: Jack and Suzi witness the Great Migration as animals cross the Mara River into Tanzania's Serengeti National Park.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: The Cape of Good Hope
programme.desc: Jack and Sue head to Cape Town where they stop traffic for travelling baboons. Then on the beach they encounter African penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: Jack and his grandson encounter an elephant road block, migrating pelicans, baboons, and hippos in Lake Manyara National Park in Tanzania.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Old House Discoveries
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin make some dramatic discoveries while demolishing the kitchen and baths, Roger moves a massive rhododendron and Norm checks out one of the finest surviving examples of the Italianate style: the over-the-top Victoria Mansion in Portland, ME.

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Teach, Learn Love, Repeat
programme.desc: A Kid Conservationist studies foxes at a wildlife sanctuary, a young woman trains service dogs, and a boy with autism discovers moments of joy on the farm.

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Medical McGyver
programme.desc: Alie shows us a Medical MacGyver who makes health devices from toys, the TV pitch man and inventor behind dozens of inventions including the Pocket Fisherman, the push to have kids learn computer code in school, and a 3D Printing Pen.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: Timeless Northern Ethiopia
programme.desc: Viewers are encouraged to break out the passport and explore cultures around the world.

programme.title: Wipeout: World Cup
programme.desc: To celebrate the World Cup, signature obstacle, 'Big Balls' is transformed into soccer balls.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Nothing Up His Cape
programme.desc: Magical pranks, lobster launch, and really fast food are some of the gags.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags: Above Par Pranks
programme.desc: Gags include smothered in laughs, hysterical pregnancy, and quit golfing around.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: House of Tutor
programme.desc: After Mike encourages Vanessa to branch out her tutoring business, she takes his advice but gets frustrated when he gets a little too involved. Meanwhile, Kyle is determined to be like the other Baxters and become a high-powered entrepreneur.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: When Eve's boyfriend, Rob, doesn't invite her to his parents' anniversary party, Vanessa feels that Eve should tell him how this makes her feel, but Mike disagrees and thinks it's better for Eve to not say anything.

programme.title: Movie: Ready or Not
programme.desc: A new bride's sinister in-laws force her to take part in a dangerous game.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: Movie: La La Land
programme.desc: An aspiring actress meets a poor jazz pianist in Los Angeles and they fall in love. As they both work towards their dreams, they become each other's supports. They begin to have success, but find that the dreams they worked for could tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Pushing Tin
programme.desc: Two self-consumed air-traffic controllers let their rivalry get out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Movie: Dick Tracy
programme.desc: Big Boy Caprice is reuniting the mob and Dick Tracy must stop him before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: The Beautician and the Beast
programme.desc: A beautician from Queens is mistakenly recruited to tutor a foreign dictator's children.

programme.title: Movie: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Repressed risk analyst Reuben Feffer keeps his life planned out perfectly until his new bride leaves him on their honeymoon. When a free-spirited former classmate comes back into his life, he re-evaluates his overly ordered universe.

programme.title: Movie: Corky Romano
programme.desc: The black sheep of a mob family pretends to be a thug to help his dad infiltrate the FBI.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith
programme.desc: John and Jane Smith are bored with their domestic life, but both lead a double life. They are deadly assassins, although neither knows about the other, and they are assigned to kill each other after they both miss their latest target.

programme.title: Movie: This Means War
programme.desc: Two CIA agents wage war against each other when they find out they have been dating the same woman.
